listing_name: 72 Steps 2 Beach Outdoor Shower Shaded Oasis
description:
Island Getaway, nestled in the heart of the island, 2 bedrooms/1bath home (shower only) numerous amenities, linens & towels provided, big backyard, grilling, hammock, and picnic table. Walk across the street, 72 steps to the beach access.

Note: this is across the street please review photos and description before booking this a very small bathroom with shower only.

Follow us on IG and FB
Post photos and tag @carolinabeachrandr
Tag #islandgetawaycb & #carolinabeachrandr

The space
Welcome to paradise! Island Getaway, offers surprising extras and special touches around every corner.

2 Bedroom single family home Original hardwood floors re-sanded and Knotty pine walls give a uniqueness inside while a spacious backyard, shaded by live oak trees, provides a atmosphere for great Pilates workout or fun BBQ. Outside is equipped with a charcoal grill, picnic table, private outdoor shower, & hammock. Sleeps 6 people max. Each room has heating & air-conditioning (central air) so this is the place to cool down after a hot day in the sun! Conveniently located across the street from the beach access, its only 72 steps to the beach access, I counted. Check out our photos to see a visual, the parking lot for beach parking is across street that other people use that is the beach access you will go there to get to the ocean.

Main bedroom has queen bed, guest 2 twin beds, and living room we have full size sleeper sofa, a pull out bed (lift cushions off and pull bed out). Bathroom is small but freshly done with a tiled standup shower. Children & adults alike will enjoy this comfortable home supplied with all the furnishings and fixtures needed for a vacation getaway.

Walk to the Ocean Grill & Tiki Bar and only 2 doors down from Ice-cream and Granny’s Kitchen for some southern breakfast. Enjoy and evening at the Shuckin Shack best seafood on the island and a local favorite.

25 years and Older to agree to our Contract. Owner speaks or message all Tentative Guest prior to accepting payments/giving contracts. Linens/Towels Included.
NO SMOKING NO PETS NO VAPING. We know you love your pets and have addictions, we cannot tolerate the dandruff, the smells, nor the dripping of pee that gets on the floors from animals nor the vaping of your chemicals. We have guest that have allergies so please book somewhere else don't ask. We have neighbors or myself will spy on this. Eviction will happen so that means a ruined vacation for you and the family. Let's all have peace of mind.

Please note: sulfur water smells on island, which includes our home.

We have a No Smoking No Pet Policy. Guest acknowledges the premises are designated as smoke-free and pet-free. Guest agrees not to smoke or have pets and will not allow any of their family or guests to smoke or have pets on the premises, either inside or outside on adjoining grounds. Guest agrees to abide by this no-smoking no-pet policy. This includes smoking tobacco, marijuana, any other substance and/or vaping chemicals. If guest smokes/vapes or allows others to smoke/vape or bring pets on the premises non-refundable security will be deducted and yes possible eviction.

Guest access
Spectrum Streaming
Smart TVs
Sign into your own accounts
We have an private outdoor shower, washer and dryer is located in the utility room in carport same area is the access of the key code lock box to retrieve key for getting inside home.

Other things to note
Beach is perfect, the Aquarium is a few miles along with Fort Fisher, you have the marina you can bring your boat there's a free marina or pay marina on the island. The Winner boat marina you have all kinds of sightseeing day or night trips. Free fireworks every Thursday provided byTown and Sunday movie night at the Lake.

Our Island Getaway is 800 ft. sq house 4-5 guest are comfortable with 1 indoor shower small bathroom and an outdoor shower. No tub. We do have small samples of conditioner and shampoo if you forget your full-size bottles. Please give us a notice if this is a work trip. Please give us a notice if you need beds made prior to check-in for each bed has their own sheets folded nicely so you can feel and smell the cleanliness of making your own beds so you can have peace of mind, and I like having cleaning products on hand. I travel a lot and know. Have any questions please feel free to give us a shout anytime.

Your Hosts,
Dari & BR
Owner of Carolina Beach R and R

listing_name: Captains Quarters Oceanfront Renovated!
description:
AMAZING RENOVATION March 2024! Wake up to the gorgeous glow of the morning sunrise! Right on the beach with MANY activities such as a fireworks, live music, pool (summer), shopping, restaurants, nightlife, & gated parking for 1 car. You’ll love this place because of the coziness, views, location & the people. Your host is providing 2 blue beach chairs, a big blue umbrella & a drink table set up on the beach daily 8:30-7 March to Labor Day weekend! Look for the RiverSmith Cabana 218 sign.

The space
Amazing renovation March 2024! Gated condo community right on the beach in Carolina Beach, park the car in the covered parking deck and walk to everything your hearts desires! Great restaurants, shopping, amusement park, arcade, live music, fun night life, don't miss nationally recognized as best ever donuts, Brit's Donuts! The views from the condo are breath-taking, wake to the sounds of the waves, have coffee in the balcony watching the sun rise. 1 bedroom sleeps 2 and a pull-out couch sleeps 2. No amenity or need left out. Smart TV's with wifi, fully stocked kitchen.
If you want to bring a pet, we need to discuss PRIOR TO BOOKING.

Guest access
Full access inside the condo and full access to pool (summer season) and private beach access. Right next to the boardwalk and shopping, etc! One parking pass is left in the condo, if you need another pass for a second car, please let host know ahead of time.

Other things to note
Your host is providing 2 blue beach chairs, a big blue umbrella & a drink table set up on the beach daily from 9:30 AM to 7 PM for your use! March to September 6th. Just look for the sign on the back of the chair marked RiverSmith Cabana 218!

The general rule is that pets are not allowed. If you have a small dog you’d like to bring, please let us know as we are open to talk about it. We do ask if a dog is agreed upon that you pay a small pet fee of $50 for our cleaning crew to ensure future guests that may be allergic to pets aren’t impacted.

The office downstairs has nothing to do with short term vacation rentals, please contact MK if you need ANYTHING.

There are places to rent extra umbrellas, chairs, things to ride on the beach and around town at Tony Silvagni’s, Pleasure Island Rentals and Hot Rods. Our guidebook has details. Use code RiverSmith at Tony Silvagni’s for 20% off!

listing_name: No Host Fees - Heated Pool - 2 min walk to Beach!
description:
Book your next vacation get away just a short 2-minute walk to our beautiful Carolina Beach sands. Nestled among a lush tropical tree lined street, enjoy your home away from home in this wonderful neighborhood (North End) - about a mile away from the crowd. From the moment of your arrival, the ample covered extended flat driveway allows effortless unloading. Your Island getaway awaits, with an outdoor oasis (new heated salt-water pool) so inviting you won't even want to go inside!

The space
THE PROPERTY

Your Island getaway awaits, with an outdoor oasis so inviting you won't even want to go inside! We have rocking chair front porches and the covered grill area that is the perfect spot for a BBQ, where you can watch the sunrise or relax! New pool with deck recently installed in backyard. Enjoy the peekaboo ocean views and colorful beach homes with mature palm trees as you dive into vacation mode!

We are renting a 3 bedroom 2 full-baths home that is 1,400 square feet in size. The living room , kitchen, and dining room are all open concept. The home has a fully equipped kitchen with high end appliances and laundry room exiting to back deck. Enjoy your morning breakfast on either balconies or on our extra long farmhouse table. The homes amenities are picnic/BBQ area, rocking chair front porches, private outdoor shower, nicely manicured yard and covered parking. Kick back and relax as your favorite show or movie plays on the 50 inch flat-screen cable TV.

Main Floor Master: recently updated to new King Bed - Bedroom 2 (upstairs): Queen Bed - Loft (Upstairs): Full over Full bunk bed - Queen Sofa Bed in Living Room : Pack n Play in closet

All bedrooms have a full bathroom on each floor and a Roku or Amazon Fire Stick TV. You'll sleep better than ever in the comfy beds outfitted with high end luxury linens. Walk out to the back balcony from 1st floor master.

LOCATION

In the North End of Carolina Beach, this ideally located property gives you access to all the island has to offer. Just less than 2 blocks from the beach and a mile away to the boardwalk, where you can enjoy restaurants, shopping, and entertainment in town after a day in the sun. You can always rent a golf cart at SunFun Rentals to get around the island.

A relaxing Saturday morning can be spent visiting the Carolina Beach Farmers Market followed up with a movie in the park on Sunday or shopping at local boutiques. Have excellent seafood restaurants steps from the home for your delightful vacation days.
Don't miss cruises in the marina, Carolina Beach deep sea fishing, and the carnival at night, true once-in-a-lifetime experiences. The Carolina Beach Yacht Club & Marina is down the street as well as Freeman Park where you can drive your 4X4 vehicle on the beach and go night fishing/camping. Sea turtles and dolphins are frequently present in Carolina Beach. Or you can go horseback riding on the beach in the off-season.

THE DIFFERENCE

It is on a mission to make vacation rental easy for guests. Every property we own personally so you can book with confidence. If you have questions prior to your trip, we are happy to assist you 7 days a week. During your stay, we are a text or phone call away and will be available 24/7 to help with any issues that may arise.

* Above Ground Salt-Water POOL with deck and new white fencing were installed in late 2023. Pool rules are in the guidebook which will be sent a week or so prior to check-in. 8 people max (6 adults) in the pool or deck. *

** As of 2025, we installed a Pool Heater and it will operate late March through mid-October. Pool Heat is set between 78-82 degrees, however, if air temps drop below 65 degrees it can affect pool temp. Therefore, pool temperatures cannot be guaranteed. Pool heating fee in off-season per request**

Note - 6 Adults MAX (18 and over is an adult) & only 1 well behaved dog allowed (under 35 lbs) over night. Please clean up after your dog to avoid an extra cleaning charge.

- 7 night min from 6/6 - 9/4 (Saturday only check-ins and check-outs during this time)

ADDITIONAL DETAILS
Key Residence Features:
- Amenities include a fully equipped kitchen with high end appliances, ice maker, coffee station with a Keurig & drip coffee maker, free high-speed WiFi, 4 flat-screen cable TVs, air conditioning, washer and dryer, high end linens, complimentary paper towels and toilet paper, hand soaps, shampoo/conditioner, outdoor hot shower, gas grill, large storage room with beach stuff and car port with bar, picnic table and swing.
- In the heart of the picturesque Carolina Beach, this Pleasure Island getaway is close to great restaurants/bars, entertainment, and shopping in town.
- Nearest Commercial Airport: ILM - Wilmington North Carolina
Policies:
- NO smoking
- ONE well behaved Dog allowed under 35 lbs and a $150 non-refundable pre-paid pet fee. Must be house trained and on flea prevention. Not allowed on furniture or upstairs.
- No parties. No events/large groups. Quiet time starts at 9pm.
- Minimum renting age 25, and person renting must be present and on-site through the stay (no renting for someone else).

Supervision of guests:
It is the tenant’s responsibility to supervise all guests and ensure house rules are followed and safety is the priority.
- During High-tide or hurricane season, some of the streets near property may flood for a few hours but our property has yet to be impacted directly - good to know the weather in advance. Follow the detour signs when this occurs.

Note - Hosted by a 5-year Superhost with exceptional reviews which we encourage you to read.

**** Also all rental prices are based on occupancy. I ACCEPTED YOUR RESERVATION BASED ON THE TOTAL PEOPLE ON YOUR BOOKING REQUEST. We want to be 100% up front the expectation on rental occupancy and guidelines. Children and Babies are considered people and will be counted in occupancy totals. This home sleeps a max of 8 people (max 6 adults).

The sand restoration project has been completed and doubled the size of our beaches.

Freeman Park (4x4 only) - this beach restoration is currently going on and targeted to be completed in early April. However, still open to 4x4 vehicles.

Guest access
Guests have access to entire home and the main entrance is a few steps up. The digital code is sent the day of checking in. You have access to entire driveway and yard.

Other things to note
This Spring, we purchased a new wooden Full over Full Bunk-Bed (pictures have not been updated) that is in the 3rd bedroom which is actually an open loft area on 2nd floor next to the 2nd bedroom. We also have a small cot and air mattress in the 2nd bedroom's closet.

As soon as you enter our Casa Del Sol, you'll notice the lighted open concept living with spacious kitchen with high-table with 2 chairs for working remotely. And a custom long farmhouse table with 5-6 chairs and a long bench. The living room has 2 oversized sofas and one is a queen sized sofa bed.

Each bedroom has a TV with streaming access to either Roku or Amazon Fire stick including YouTubeTV, Prime, Disney & other streaming services. High Speed internet with Mbps up to 600.

We will send you our Guidebook within 10 days of checking-in with our favorite recommendations around the Pleasure Island as well as house/pool rules and check-out instructions. Our golf cart is NOT for use but you can rent one down the street at SunFun Rentals.

As mentioned above, we only allow 1 non-shedding dog with paid non-refundable pet fee under 35 lbs.

Spring Special - We are paying the AirBnB host fees!

listing_name: Carolina Beach, Home Sweet Home!
description:
Carolina Beach is so peaceful in the winter- no doubt.
Beautiful weather, no crowds.
Bring your boat, dock in the backyard.
Spectacular sunrises/sunsets.
Wilmington nightlife-wow.
Boardwalk a stroll away.
State park nearby,4wd beach,the ferry,the PELICANS (!) and so much more!
A beautiful place to be at peace or have family fun! Enjoy the view or be a part of it. We welcome you into our home. Check us out!
Holidays at the beach are amazing.

The space
There are 3 bedrooms, 2.5 baths.Linens and towels are provided upon request.Full (URL HIDDEN) in the garage.2 double size parking spaces.Nearby boardwalk, state parks, 4 wheel drive area, restaurants,Wilmington, Wrightsville Beach, Kure Beach and the ferry.Across the street watch the sunrise over the ocean, then watch the sunset on both of our decks!Pelicans and dolphins are everywhere!!!

Guest access
Our Casa is your Casa. The entire townhouse minus an owners cage and closet are yours. There is a seasonal outdoor pool to the complex. Bring your bikes; bring your kayaks and launch them from your backyard.You may charter a fishing boat or take surfing lessons. Do as much or as little as you want!

Other things to note
No smoking, no pets.
Remember, this is a residence, not a hotel..There are homeowners next door NOT on vacation so please consider others.
You are welcome in our home.
You should have what you need to start. (tp, linens, sheets, etc).
Anything damaged or missing (other than expirables) will need to be replaced before the next guests arrive.
Please let us know BEFORE we find it.
King tides and full moons may result in short time roadway flooding 4 or 5 times a year. The locals consider this part of Carolina Beach charm.
With water behind us and the ocean across from us, there are beautiful birds all around, bring your binoculars!
This property is not handicap accessible.
Entrance to the front door includes stairs and the bedrooms are located on the second floor.
Bring your boat with proof of insurance.
The beach is gorgeous any time of the year.Give us a call!

listing_name: Fabulous Ocean Views, across the street pricing
description:
Updated 6 br 4 ba beach house in the heart of Carolina Beach. Right across the street from the beach access and has great views from the decks. Decorated more modern than beachy, we've tried to think of everything you'll need for a great beach stay.

The house is large and spacious, and has Roku TVs in all the rooms - enjoy the beach during the day, stream what you want in the evenings.

The space
This gorgeous home is located right across the street from the beach, has ocean views, and a beach access just steps away. There are 6 bedrooms and 4 baths. New carpet was installed and the hardwoods refinished to start the summer 2015 rental season. All of the bedrooms have roku-enabled TVs.

The gourmet kitchen has granite counter tops, stainless steel appliances and is ready to accommodate large families or groups. There is a bar height counter that seats 4, and the counter-height dining table seats 8. It's also a great place to gather to play board games. The home has hardwood floors in all the common areas.

The living area has a 55-inch wifi-enabled flat screen TV, the master a 40-inch TV, and all the other bedrooms have 32-inch TVs as well. Cable TV and high speed wireless internet service (dual-band router) are also provided for your enjoyment.

The entry first floor has two bedrooms - one in the middle of the home with a full over full bunk bed, and the other with a queen bed. There's a jack and jill (shared) bathroom on the entry floor with dual vanities and a toilet/shower area that has a door to close it off from the vanity area.

The main second floor has the great room with living room, dining, and the gourmet kitchen. This level also has a bedroom with a queen bed. There is also a full bath on this level with separate doors the the bedroom and common area.

The third floor has the master and two guest rooms that share a full bath - one bedroom has a queen bed and the other one another full over full bunk bed.

The master bedroom has a king bed, a private deck, and a fabulous master bathroom with dual vanities, a glass enclosed shower, and a whirlpool tub. You can sit in the bed in the master and look out at great ocean views!

For ocean viewing, there are two nicely furnished covered decks. One is on the main 2nd floor and the other is just off the master bedroom. Both are great for watching the ocean, watching people, reading, enjoying time with family and friends.

To make your stay more enjoyable, the house is secured with a keypad lock. No worrying about who has the key! There's also a beach cart provided to make for an even easier walk over to the beach and back. And of course there's an outdoor shower for when you get home.

Carolina Beach is an incredible vacation spot, with something for everyone in the family. There's a boardwalk with a permanent amusement park for the kids during the summer. The town hosts many movie nights at the lake, and they also have paddle boats there available for rent. The north end of the island allows 4 wheel drive vehicles, and there's a pier there as well. Kure beach also has a pier, which is about a mile away and makes for a nice stroll down the beach.

At the far south end of the island is the Fort Fisher state park with large uncrowded beaches, the aquarium, and the ferry to Southport.

This beautiful home is centrally located. The Tiki bar and Granny's Country Kitchen are short walks. The town area of Carolina Beach is just over a mile to the north, and Kure Beach is about a mile to the south.

This house is 1/2 of a duplex. Linens are included. Beds are 1 King, 3 Queens, and 4 fulls (2 full over full bunk beds).

Guest access
When you rent, you're renting the whole house. Note - this house is half of a duplex, and each side is 6br 4 ba. So you'll have the house - one side - to yourself.

Other things to note
Linens are provided. Extra paper products and spare kitchen accessories are stored in the closet of the upstairs hall bath.

There's usually a supply of beach chairs and a cooler in the outside storage, but these are more take a chair leave a chair and not managed.

Parking is limited to 4 cars.

listing_name: Modern Shipping Container*Two blocks to the beach
description:
Located a short walk from the beach, this modern shipping container home offers everything a couple or small family could want for a fun surf trip or beach vacation.
The home has been profiled in the New York Times, Coastal Living and Apartment Therapy. It features modern and well-equipped interior spaces situated in a peaceful and private setting.

The space
The Conchs are two shipping container houses that were thoughtfully constructed in an effort to create unique but low profile vacation rentals for visitors to Carolina Beach, NC. The containers are located on adjoining lots so that they can be rented independently or together for a larger group. The siting of the units on the lots ensures plenty privacy and lots of space to spread out. If the container is not available for your dates see the listing for Modern Beach Container Home #1.
The architecturally engineered space measures 320 square feet and is comfortable inside and out. The interiors offer all the amenities you need plus some interesting details such as Casper mattresses, spacious bathrooms, Paperstone countertops, and original mahogany hardwood floors.
Large teak outdoor showers are the best! (there is a spacious indoor shower) Canopies of hardwood trees provide shade so you can enjoy the ample decks and yard.
There is a public beach access at the end of the street which offers an easy beach entrance and parking spaces.

Comforters and pillows are provided but we do not provide sheets or towels and this is reflected in the rate. Most people bring their own or Seaside Linens can rent linens and we are happy to assist in any way.

Soap

Paper towels
Toilet paper
Pack light!

Bathing suit

This container comfortably accommodates two adults and a small child. The space has a double bed and a day bed.

listing_name: Beach Front with Ocean Views from a Covered Deck!
description:
Take a look at our photos. You will see we are a perfect location for easy beach access. Inside, we know you'll love the crisp, cool feeling throughout the living spaces, but nothing beats the fantastic view of the sand and water from the full sized deck!

The space
Our OCEAN/BEACH front 3 bedroom, 2 bathroom condo is available and ready for you! Be sure to view the photos. You'll see a comfortable space ready with everything you need for a perfect beach vacation.

During peak summer weeks we require 7 night stays, but we're flexible on the check-in and check-out days. You can send an inquiry if you have a question, but requests less than the minimum will most likely receive a polite decline.

Located just a short way from the Carolina Beach boardwalk area, you'll have everything you need in walking distance. Our condo is situated in a 6 unit structure that has parking for three vehicles for each unit, including a one car garage.

Private beach access keeps your area a bit more secluded than other places. The condo is on the raised first floor which makes the loading up part of your vacation less grueling and time consuming without sacrificing the beautiful ocean view from the covered porch.

Inside, you'll find open living space with a full kitchen, dining space, and living room. The unit has 3 bedrooms and 2 full bathrooms with shower stalls. One of the baths is off the master bedroom. Everything your family or three couples need for a great get away at the beach.

The kitchen has enough to make large or small meals! Every stay includes a linen package supplied by our cleaning service. That includes all bedding and bath towels.

Guest access
Private beach access and enough secured parking for three vehicles, including single car garage. Private back deck with plenty of seating. There are a bunch of sand toys for your use.

Other things to note
During the summer season, we require the traditional 7 night stay. We could consider a 5 night minimum starting in May. We are flexible on check-in and check-out days.

listing_name: Plenty of space for everyone!
description:
Step inside and let the private elevator make your arrival effortless, easily transporting your luggage, groceries, and even helping grandparents comfortably reach the upper floors.
-5 bedrooms with additional double bunk bed and futon in playroom.
-5 minute walk to beach with easy access
-5 minute bike ride to shops and restaurants
-jogging loop around lake is a minute right down the road
-linens and towels provided
-bicycles, beach toys, umbrellas and a wagon provided
Must be 24 to rent

The space
Experience comfort and convenience in this spacious 5-bedroom condo, Thoughtfully designed for relaxation and entertainment, the condo offers a variety of sleeping arrangements—including 1 king bed, 3 queen beds, and 2 twin beds—with fresh linens and towels provided. The playroom adds extra fun with a double bunk bed, a large TV, and a cozy futon couch for lounging A private indoor elevator makes transporting groceries and luggage to upper floors effortless. Enjoy plenty of space to gather with loved ones or retreat to quiet corners for relaxation. Each bedroom opens onto to a balcony, perfect for unwinding.

The property offers a total of nine beds, including bunk beds in the playroom, along with a futon in the same area for added flexibility. This setup comfortably accommodates up to 13 guests, ensuring everyone has a cozy place to sleep. Linens and towels included!

Parking is limited to a maximum of four vehicles in the designated space directly beneath and in front of the unit. Unfortunately, parking in any other area is not permitted.

Minimum age to book our place is 24 and this person must be present the entire stay.

Due to the intimate size of the complex and the presence of year-round owner-occupied units, this home is not suitable for guests planning loud parties or late-night gatherings. Instead, it’s the perfect getaway for families and groups seeking a relaxing and enjoyable vacation at the beautiful North Carolina coast. This welcoming space offers a comfortable and peaceful setting for making lasting memories by the beach.



.

Guest access
Guests can enjoy a variety of complimentary beach gear, including bicycles, a paddleboard, surfboards, beach chairs, umbrellas, and a convenient rolling cart for easy transport. For added fun, local businesses in Carolina Beach offer golf cart rentals and more—let us know if you’d like recommendations!

While gas and charcoal grills are not permitted, we provide a high-quality electric outdoor grill that delivers exceptional cooking results.

Other things to note
One of our favorite ways to end the day is by driving down to Fort Fisher to watch the stunning sunset or you can stay and watch it from the top floor in your cozy condo. During the summer, be sure to treat yourself to the famous Britt’s Donuts on the famous downtown boardwalk, grab fresh produce and local goodies from the Veggie Wagon (right around the corner) . Make sure to enjoy delicious food and drinks at the nearby Ocean Grill and Tiki Bar located right on the beach! For those with a four-wheel-drive vehicle, don’t miss the chance to drive right onto the beach at Freeman Park on the north end for an unforgettable coastal experience.

The space
From the moment you set foot on the Brazilian Cherry hardwood floors or lay your head on the Egyptian bedding you'll feel pampered from head to toe.

Start the day sipping on coffee as you take in the magnificent ocean views from the top floor balcony. Then, via our private boardwalk enjoy a near private beach experience. Or, enjoy a dip in our newly renovated gated swimming pool. Don't forget your tennis rackets, enjoy a game or two at our tennis courts! Private boardwalk to the beach.

FREE HIGH SPEED INTERNET, but not guaranteed.

High Chair, stroller and Pack N' Play.

Fish off the North End Pier or fish in the Intracoastal Waterway.

We strive to make sure our guests have all the comforts of home. Everything is top quality!


FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS:

Are pets allowed at Tranquility at CB?

NO. We have a strict NO PET policy. Please do not book this property if you intend on bringing any kind of pet. We cannot accept any pets due to a medical condition of the host who often spends time at the property (severe allergies among others).
Any guest found with a pet in a property will be required to vacate the premises without refund. Plus, pay for any cleanup fees. This is strictly enforced.

Is the pool and Jacuzzi open year round?

The pool and Jacuzzi are outdoor and are seasonal. Generally, the hot tub opens around Easter and closes after Thanksgiving. Note: HOA may alter dates that we’re not aware of for a variety of reasons.

What is Tranquility at CB's check-in/check-out policy?

On your scheduled day of arrival, you may check-in anytime after 4:00 pm EST. On your scheduled date of departure, check-out time is 10:00 am EST. Early check-ins and late check-outs can't be confirmed until the day before arrival or departure. The fee is an extra $50 per hour, up to 4 hours. ALL EARLY CHECK-INS & LATE CHECK-OUTS MUST BE CONFIRMED IN ADVANCE.

What is Tranquility at CB's cancellation policy?

Cancellations that are made more than thirty (30) days prior to the arrival date will result in forfeiture of the initial reservation deposit. NO refunds will be provided for cancellations made within thirty (30) days of the arrival date. Early departure does not warrant any refund.

What is provided for each rental in regards to linens, bath towels, and toiletries?

Each bed within the property will be complete with sheets, pillow cases, and a blanket and/or comforter upon arrival. Each full bathroom is outfitted with at least 1 large bath towel per person, 1 hand towel per person, 1 wash cloth per person, and a bath mat. We provide beach towels for the beach and/or pool. The linens will only be serviced by Tranquility and Carolina Beach staff upon departure. Each bathroom will have an initial supply of hand soap and toilet tissue. Each kitchen will have an initial stock of paper towels, dish soap and trash bags.

What housekeeping service does Tranquility at CB offer?

Each rental home will be cleaned prior to guest check-in and then upon guest check-out and departure. This is scheduled at the time of your reservation and is required. Additional housekeeping services such as mid-stay cleans and towel and linen service are available upon request for an additional charge.

Should you leave something behind, please let us know. We are happy to send your items back to you, however we will charge you for the shipping and time.

Other amenities: Flat screen ROKU TV's in bedrooms and living room, surround sound (including balcony), built in wet bar, wine cooler, ceiling fans, recessed lights, crown molding in every room, breakfast bar, granite counter-tops, pendant lights, two parking spaces, beach wagon, beach chairs, boogie board, sand toys, beach towels, linens and towels, hair-dryer, iron, ironing board, free high speed internet.

In addition to the beach, spend time shopping at 'The Boardwalk' where you can also play games and enjoy thrilling amusement parks rides during the summer months. While there, enjoy handmade donuts, fudge and ice cream and breathtaking fireworks! Also on Pleasure Island visit Fort Fisher or take a short ferry ride to Historic Southport. Historic Wilmington is about 15 minutes northwest.

Rent our other properties AntiguaBella and AntiguaSoleil in Antigua and Barbuda.

Guest access
Everything in the condo! The balcony has tables and chairs for eating or just relaxing and watching the ocean. Also full access to front load washer and dryer in the condo. It's all yours!

Other things to note
PRICE INCLUDES TAX!!!

listing_name: Beach House @Tiki OceanFront 2B Cottage + Cocktail
description:
Historic Oceanfront Beach Villa, all updated!! Dog friendly!!

2 large Bedrooms with 1 Bath + Full Kitchen, Dining, Living Room. Huge Wraparound Porches on One level, at the Atlantic Ocean.

Only the side porch is shared with a separate Lockout Ensuite bedroom. No access to your Cottage.

Onsite Parking for 2 cars.

We greet you with a complimentary Welcome Tiki Cocktail, Basket of Yummy Snacks, WiFi & Cable TV, Shower basics, Linens - FREE!

The space
Our Oceanfront bungalow cottage is 1200’ of Oceanfront Sunshine! A large comfy living room, dining room and kitchen - all flowing for open family space. The living room has a large Wise Leather sofa, as well as a large Leather club chair and ottoman in the living room. Lots of DVDs and family-friendly games included.

We stock your kitchen with spices, condiments, some cereals and starter coffee and tea. From there on - it's your kitchen for cooking.
Dine outside on the big, shared Oceanfront Porches and decks overlooking the Atlantic Ocean, sparkling just in front of you.

A large kitchen table in the kitchen area, and several outdoor dining and relaxing areas. Your 2B Cottage has loads of DVDs, games and a work table.

Later, sip on your cocktails (we welcome you home with a specially hand-crafted Tiki Signature Cocktail made by your hostess for the week) - as you settle in and relax in your serene space. Later, walk out on the wide sandy beaches - flashlights also provided for your use.

Walk 3/4 mile along the beach to the famous, USA Today reader voted award-winning Carolina Beach Boardwalk - with loads of live entertainment, fine and casual dining restaurants and live music. The Ocean Grill Tiki Bar has live bands from 7-9PM all summer. Watch the CB Boardwalk Fireworks from your own Oceanfront Deck. - the Tiki Bar is a short 2 minute walk up the beach. This is a quiet more private section of Carolina Beach, with a public access walkway but no public parking... making this a very exclusive, sought-after property for beachfront pleasures!! Be spoiled!!!

The large Oceanfront Bedroom has a Double bed and a Twin bed to sleep three folks. Adjoining is the one bathroom. The Middle bedroom has a super-comfy plush Queen bed. Each bedroom has chairs and dressers as well as padded hangers. Each bedroom has its own lock if needed.

If you need additional SPACE - consider also booking one of our TWO UPSTAIRS bedrooms!! Beach House @Tiki Oceanfront KING or Beach House @Tiki Oceanfront Queen. Or maybe book the entire One level space to include the Ensuite Queen and extra bathroom. Just ask! We may be able to offer special pricing on a combo with all five bedrooms for your stay. Remember, we live on the third level and share the space on the second level above the Cottage with two B&B style bedrooms.

Guest access
Guests have access to the public beach walkway to the ocean with a lifeguard stand just there. There is also a private beach access directly from your porch along with hoses on the walkway for rinsing beach toys, chairs and coolers.

Under the house there's also a hot and cold shower with shampoos and shower gels located on the ground level as well as additional seating areas you're welcome to enjoy.
There is parking for two cars. Bikes, kayaks, surfboards are all available for rental nearby.

Your hostess can also arrange for a group yoga on the beach, a morning guided meditation, a private guided kayak tour, hikes through the state park to Sugarloaf dune, or a hike to the Fort Fisher hermit with narration and storytelling. Also available are cooking classes as well as tea by the sea for up to 12 people, or even oceanfront dining for up to four or six people.

Other things to note
ABSOLUTELY NO SMOKING ANYWHERE on the Property.

Outdoor Charcoal grill is available - see the host for instructions on cleaning, etc.

Specially catered five course dinner may be arranged as well as private non-professional yoga, meditation, or guided non-professional kayak or walking tours to secret places....

If you need additional SPACE - consider also booking one of our TWO UPSTAIRS bedrooms!! Beach House @Tiki Oceanfront KING or Beach House @Tiki Oceanfront Queen. Just ask! We may be able to offer special pricing on a combo with all five bedrooms for your stay. Remember, we do live on the third level and share the space on the second level above the Cottage.

Well-behaved and trained dogs may be permitted to join your family. Carolina Beach has recentky voted to permits people to walk their leashed dogs on the beach in the mornings and evenings throughout the summer - and there are MANY, MANY dog-friendly restaurants nearby! We require dogs name and breed, as well as vets name so we may verify vaccinations and health of all dogs to keep everyone safe. A MANDATORY NIGHTLY dog fee is all requested via Airbnb after verification.

listing_name: The Mariner's Cottage
description:
203 steps from the sand! The Mariner's Cottage is a downstairs efficiency with kitchen. There is a pantry, storage closet, bath and washer/dryer unit. Pets considered at owner's discretion. Carolina Beach is located on Pleasure Island and is the perfect place for your relaxing vacation. If relaxing on the sand is not your thing, Carolina Beach has lots of activities for adults and children. Traveling with friends? See if the upstairs unit is available!

The space
The Mariner's Cottage is in a residential area with lots of year round residents. Short walk to the beach with friendly neighbors. Easy access to the Greenway trail too. Great neighborhood for walks and biking and skateboarding! It is a relaxing spot for sure! Beautiful spot on the porch for coffee in the quiet mornings. The evenings have beautiful cotton candy skies! When you are outside be sure to listen for the waves! You just might be able to hear them!

Be sure to message us and ask about our early check in and check out!

Guest access
Guests have access to a separate entrance from downstairs unit, their own full kitchen, private bedroom and bath. Guests are welcome to use the porch and lawn.
Parking on the premises. Maximum 2 cars. (Please let us know if there will be more than one.)

Other things to note
Carolina Beach is close to many outdoor activities. The Carolina Beach State park is close by with great trails. The entire area is wonderful for being on bikes. The beaches are beautiful and the locals are super friendly. There are great restaurants with kid menus and also more adult venues. Lots of live music in many restaurants/bars. During the summer season, there is a carnival with rides and games of chance for the kids. Each Thursday night there are fireworks on the boardwalk and Sunday nights there are outdoor movies by the lake.

* We have stayed so booked that we been unable to install new flooring and paint. It will be done in down time. Please know that the floor is not dirty! It is just time for our vintage look to be updated.

listing_name: Home Away From Home
description:
Our home is a block away from all the action in town however we're secluded, private and right across from the lake.

We're within walking distance of anything you need.

It’s a 5-8 minute walk to the beach depending on what your carrying ie. kids, coolers, chairs, umbrellas, etc. and we do offer a beach cart to help with this process.

Walking or jogging around the lake is great exercise. One lap around is 2/3 mile.

The space
Our space is very accommodating for parties of 10.

This is the MAXIUMN GUESTS ALLOWED to spend the night.

Again, to be clear only 10 Guests are to stay overnight on our property.

My favorite thing about our house is the constant development of the area underneath house for entertaining with special lighting. Be sure to bring your own portable speaker.

The fire pit is also a huge hit but burning technically isn't allowed on Carolina Beach but as long as it's not a huge fire and you're not loud it's usually not an issue.

Guest access
Our property can accommodate up to 6 vehicles.

We do offer early check-in when available and our cleaners can accommodate.

HOWEVER, parking on the property before your check-in time IS NOT allowed as it interferes with our cleaner's ability to move around the property.

Should you find yourself on the Island early or just wanna hit the beach before check-in there's plenty of public parking at the beginning of the street next to the beach.

The Hang Ten grill is also a great place to grab a bite to eat before check-in as well.

HINT: The restaurant has 2 free parking areas behind it for their customers.

Lake Waterfront Town home with Great views and short walk to Beach, Boardwalk, Shopping and Eateries.

The space
The unit is lakefront with a greenway around it. There is a porch on the second floor off of the living room which overlooks the lake. There is another porch on the third floor off of the master bedroom which overlooks the lake, the nearby eateries and has glimpses of the beach. The ground floor has a walk out patio and has access to the back yard, the greenway and the lake.

Guest access
Guest has access to the entire town house.

Other things to note
The town house is close to many attractions including a nightly carnival with rides during the summer season. The boardwalk that houses restaurants and shops is a short walk away. There are weekly fireworks during the summer. There are venders with crafts and fresh fruits and vegetables that set up booths on the lake every Saturday. The lake is very festive with decorations during the Christmas season. Carolina beach state park on the intercostal waterways is just up the road taking about 5 minutes to get to the parking.
**There are lake renovations occurring presently until January 2026. Only a short section of the greenway around the lake is affected. It does not prevent tourists from getting to any destinations.

listing_name: Spectacular * Oceanfront Condo - Once Upon A Tide
description:
Fully updated oceanfront condo with an unbeatable ocean view located in the heart of Carolina Beach! This 3rd floor, 2 bed/2 bath, oceanfront condo is equipped with everything you need for an unforgettable visit to Carolina Beach. The unit is located within walking distance of the Boardwalk, Carolina Beach Lake Park, a variety of restaurants, nightlife, shopping, and many other popular local attractions.

The space
Coral Surf has a private beach access behind the building as well as a private pool open between May and October. Or you can sit back, relax, and enjoy the sounds of the ocean from the top floor balcony. The view is particularly stunning early in the morning when the sun first rises.

The fully equipped kitchen includes stainless steel appliances, coffee maker, toaster, washer/dryer, utensils, plates, cups, pots/pans, etc. General amenities include dish washer, Wifi, central heat/air, covered parking for 2 cars, keyless entry, fully equipped kitchen, linens, bath towels, beach towels, cable TV with premium movie channels, and several games. We also have a beach wagon, tent and toys available for your use!

We've spent the time to make our condo TURNKEY so that you can spend your time with your family, relaxing, enjoying the views, and making memories.

House Rules: This home does not allow pets, smoking, events or parties. Must be 25 years old to book the home. Rental agreement is required to be signed within 48 hours of booking the home.

IMPORTANT: This is a non-smoking unit (including E-cigs/Vaping), and no pets are allowed in the entire complex.

Guest access
Guests have access to the entire condo, and are also welcome to use community pool and the private beach access!

Other things to note
All linens are included with your stay, and beds will be made and ready for your arrival. A set of towels will be laid out for each guest.

We look forward to hosting you!!

listing_name: Tiki Time Carolina Beach! Oceanfront, Best View!
description:
Our place is right on the beach with panoramic views! Ocean Front w/ large covered deck with bar height table and chairs. Luxury vinyl plank flooring , newer furniture, kitchen with quartz countertops and stainless appliances. TOWELS and LINENS provided and beds made on arrival. Beach gear for your use. Outdoor shower. Well stocked kitchen. We are on the second floor of a raised building. Two flights of stairs, no elevator.

4 night minimum Memorial Day weekend through Labor Day

The space
We think our condo is a great space for up to 6 people.

* Family Room - vinyl plank floors, smart TV, WIFI, wireless speaker, books and (please feel free to take what you started and leave what you finished), games sleeper sofa, love seat and chair.

Kitchen - New kitchen 2019 includes white shaker cabinets, quartz countertops and recessed lighting. Table for for four and two bar stools at the counter. stainless appliances including glass top electric range, quiet dishwasher and refrigerator. The kitchen is equipped with pots, pans, Corelle white dishes, glasses, coffee cups, plastic cups, Koozies, wine glasses, silverware, corkscrew, bottle opener, storage containers for leftovers, pot holders, tea pot, Keurig single serve coffee maker with 48 oz reservoir (bring your own pods), drip coffee pot and filters, strainer, cookie sheet, cake pan and more! We have a large pot for Shrimp Boil dinners. We also provide dish soap and dishwasher soap.

Master bedroom - Queen size bed with memory foam. If your group is planning to use the sleeper sofa you may want to take the memory foam from the queen bed and put it on the sleeper for added comfort. The master closet is locked however we have a hanging rack with hangers for your use and there is an extra blanket on this rack. Under this rack is a bin with sheets for the sleeper sofa. There is also a luggage rack. All other beds will be made on your arrival. We have a desk, monitor, keyboard, mouse and mouse pad, just bring your laptop! The master has a ceiling fan, dresser for your use and a smart TV. There are beach towels in the bottom drawer (feel free to use, but please launder and return to the drawer prior to check out). There is a balcony off the master bedroom with chairs where you can keep an eye out for the Uber, Pizza delivery or your guests.

Master bathroom - Single vanity and shower with amazing water pressure!. Under the sink is shampoo and conditioner and a blow dryer. Bath towels, hand towels and wash clothes are provided as are washcloths for removing makeup, individually wrapped bar soap and a roll of toilet paper to get you started.

Bedroom 2 - Two twin beds, dresser for your use with beach towels in the bottom drawer. Feel free to use but please launder and return to the drawer when you check out. The closet is locked but there is a hanging rack with hangers. There is a ceiling fan and a view of the ocean if you peak out the window. Extra blankets are on the hanging rack and games are in the night stand. On each bed is a bath towel, hand towel and wash cloth.

Hall bathroom - Tub/shower combo and a new stacked w/d with laundry soap and softener sheets provided. Under the sink you will find shampoo and conditioner. There is a hair dryer in the drawer. Please use special wash clothes for makeup removal. An individual wrapped bar of soap and a roll of toilet paper will get you started. We also provide cotton swabs and q-tips.

A few extra things to note. Are you one of those people who needs to sleep with a fan? If so you will find a small fan in the master as well as a noise machine. We have extra trash bags, broom and vacuum cleaner and other specialty cleaning supplies like carpet shampoo and upholstery cleaner.

The deck has new has a love seat and two chairs with cushions and a coffee table. Additionally there is a new polywood dining table with four chairs where you can enjoy your lunch in the shade after a hot day at the beach. The deck is covered which is great on a rainy day or after a long day in the sun. We have early morning sun and afternoon shade.

We tried to think of everything. Forget your book? Grab one from inside the TV stand. Finish your book or magazine? Leave it for the next guest. Forget your reading glasses, you are in luck! Look in the basket in the TV stand or the master nightstand. Batteries, pens, board games, playing cards, beach towels (the bottom drawer of each dresser), laundry soap, dishwasher soap, dish soap, hand soap, lotion, bath soap, shampoo, conditioner, coffee filters, trash bags, paper towels and toilet paper (one roll for each bathroom).

As as added bonus we give you access to our lower level storage closet where you will find beach chairs, boogies boards, beach umbrellas and more!. We don't make promises on what will be in that room, since things periodically break or disappear. Feel free to leave anything behind that you can't fit back in your car that you think a future guest will enjoy.

Important information about parking: You may only bring two cars, no exceptions. Parking is not designated but is first come first serve (we guarantee one spot). There are two covered areas under the building. If you have two cars and choose to park in covered parking then both cars must be in the covered area tandem. Parking passes are on the table in the condo. Be sure to put them in your car immediately on arrival.

Check in is 3 pm, but we have key less entry so you will have access to the condo even if you arrive very late. Check out is 10 am.

Guest access
Our condo parking lot can accommodate up to two vehicles per unit, although only spot is guaranteed. When you check in you need to put a parking permit in your car immediately. Parking permits are inside the condo in a white bowl. Paid parking is available at Ocean Blvd and Alabama Blvd (with 24 hour maximum). Key less entry code provided before check in. Key to lower level storage with beach gear is on the hook by the front door.

Other things to note
4 night minimum Memorial day through Labor day. 3 night minimum March through May and September through October.

Aquarium 10 minute drive, Kure Beach Pier 1.7 miles, Carolina Beach Boardwalk/Britt Donuts 1 mile, Walmart 15 minutes, CVS minute clinic 5 minutes, Gas station/convenience store 3 blocks away, Grandma's Country Kitchen across the street, Ocean Grill and Tiki Bar two doors down.

The space

HOWEVER, we always greet you with a special hand-crafted Tiki Cocktail to welcome you to the Tiki Life at Beach House @Tiki. - For the basics of a Great Oceanview Queen-sized Bed in a large private bedroom that faces southward onto the Ocean - it doesn't get any better than this value-priced Airbnb listing.

Other things to note

listing_name: Mermaid Retreat* Private Pool* Pet Friendly
description:
Mermaid Retreat is a mermaid-themed home with private pool across from public beach access 9 on Carolina Beach! Plenty of parking alongside the fence and one spot in front, the home is on a corner lot.

The space
This one-story beach home is a 3 bed/2 bath with private pool, fenced in backyard and outdoor shower. Living room has 1 suede double recliner couch and another suede couch. All beds are memory foam/gel for added comfort. Kitchen is stocked with serving ware, cook ware, updated appliances (fridge has ice maker). Utility room has a large washer & dryer.

Guest access
Guests have the entire property to themselves. Backyard is completely fenced-in with bamboo screening, a gas grill, open hot/cold outdoor shower to rinse off, outdoor seating & dining. Off-street parking fits about 3-5 vehicles along the fence, and parking in front fits 1 large vehicle or 1 compact and a golf cart.

Other things to note
Mermaid Retreat is taking extra precautions to ensure your stay is comfortable and safe. Our cleaning team continues to spray down surfaces in the home, but we are following up with an antivirus, antibacterial, antimicrobial, antifungal solution called Armor spray from Selah Oils. We consider pets as part of the family so we do not charge pet fees, but in return we ask that our guests please pick up after their pets with the pet waste bag dispensers and the outside pet waste bin to avoid contamination between pets. We also run the sprinklers to clean our grass and help things along.
We provide Starlink WiFi, smart TVs, Dish network. The home has safes to secure your valuables. Laundry room has first aid kit, pet bowls, cleaning supplies, iron, and ironing board. Master bedroom has Greco Pack N Play with mattress and sheets, and an XL pet crate if needed. Carolina Beach excludes pets between 9am - 5pm during the summer months - April 1 - Sept 30.
We keep extra leashes and rolls of pet waste bags to take with you in the cabinet beside the front door.
Carolina Lake and the beach are walking distance from the home!

description:
Treat yourself to an OCEANFRONT condo that’s only a short walk to the shore and on a private boardwalk! Paradise Found is right in the middle of all the fun activities of Carolina Beach—the newly renovated boardwalk, restaurants, shops, famous Britt’s Donuts, the amusement park (in season), and bars.

The space
Fresh linens and towels are included in the cleaning fee, so no need to worry about extra charges!

Enjoy perfect ocean views, the sound of waves crashing on the beach, dolphins frolicking in the surf, and amazing sunrises all from your private balcony in this third floor condo (with an elevator!!). No need to load up the beach wagon and trek across roads, Paradise Found is on the ocean!

Every Thursday night in Carolina Beach there are free fireworks on the beach (which you can see from the balcony) and bands playing on the boardwalk. Sunday nights feature free movies playing at the lake, which is only a short walk from Paradise Found. On Friday evenings, there is a free outdoor concert at Fort Fisher State park, which is only a short drive away.

If you are looking for a beachfront property that has everything you need, look no further than Paradise Found!

listing_name: The Sea Shanty Cottage -Mins to CB Boardwalk/Beach
description:
This charming Carolina Beach cottage offers a unique blend of old and new. It's conveniently located just one block from the newly redesigned boardwalk and two blocks away from the public beach access. Explore the restaurants, bars, arcades, and live music events that Carolina Beach is renowned for, all within easy walking distance.

The space
Location of the cottage is what makes it unique. One block from the new and beautifully designed boardwalk with beach access right there. Walk to all the restaurants, bars, arcades, activities, and live music events that Carolina Beach is famous for and is right off Lake Park Boulevard.

Plenty of parking available, and once you park you don't have to drive for your whole stay (unless you want to take in some of the awesome local scenes like the NC Aquarium or the US Battleship).

Cottage includes amenities for you and your family including an enclosed outdoor shower with hot water, patio with a fire pit to gather around, ping pong table, charcoal grill and a private fenced backyard.

Fast Wifi to stream Hulu, Netflix, AT&T TV, ESPN+, Prime and Disney+. 3 large flat screen smart TVs in the family room and the bedrooms.

Take YOUR beach gear and provided beach towels on a quick stroll to the beach in the wagon provided for you, but grab yourself some Britts Doughnuts first along the way for breakfast. When you're ready to refuel, head over to Franks Pizza and have a slice or 3 for lunch. When you've had enough sun, walk the family back, clean off the sand at the outdoor shower and have a lovely meal at home.

You can enjoy the whole house and the private fenced backyard.

Plenty of places for drinking, dancing, and dining available nearby. Golf cart and all other beach toy rentals imaginable, one block away. Fishing tours and booze cruise across the street at the Marina! Surfing lessons, kayaking tours, and all things beachy are right here!

Guest access
No keys to lose or to return! This property provides secure, keyless entry with a Smart Lock. You can lock and unlock the door with your smartphone, using a unique virtual key, or personal entry code issued to you for the duration of your stay.

Other things to note
Please no one over 150 pounds on the bunk beds.

The property has three security cameras, one in the front porch, on the side near the driveway facing the road and in the backyard. There are no cameras anywhere else in the property.

listing_name: Oceanfront 3BR - Huge Balcony • Steps to the Beach
description:
Wake up to ocean views from inside this true oceanfront condo, just a 1-minute walk to the beach with no roads to cross. Perfect for families or groups, this spacious 3-bedroom retreat features a large covered balcony, direct beach access, and sleeps up to 7. Guests can enjoy the seasonal complex pool (open May–October).

Why guests love it:
★ Oceanfront w/ unobstructed views
★ 1-minute walk to beach & pool
★ Large covered oceanfront deck
★ Family-friendly layout
★ Bed & bath linens provided

The space
We’d love to welcome you to our peaceful, airy oceanfront condo, where slowing down comes naturally and the ocean is always in view. From the moment you arrive, you can settle in, take a deep breath, and enjoy everything Carolina Beach has to offer.

One of our favorite things about the condo is falling asleep to the sound of the waves, and waking up to the beautiful coastal light each morning. The open living space is bright and comfortable, and the fully equipped kitchen has everything you need to cook, gather, and enjoy meals together.

Step outside onto the large, covered oceanfront deck, grab a cup of coffee or a cocktail, and take in the incredible views. It’s the perfect spot for morning coffee, relaxed meals, or simply watching the waves roll in.

After a beach day, rinse off and cool down in the seasonal swimming pool, open from May through October.

The condo is located on an elevated first floor, so getting to the beach and pool is quick and easy—no long walks or elevators to worry about.

Condo features include:

*Oceanfront location with gorgeous views

*Elevated first-floor unit — steps to the beach and pool

*Large covered oceanfront balcony

*Fully equipped kitchen for home-cooked meals

*Oceanfront master bedroom

*Seasonal complex pool (open May–October)

*Bed linens and bath towels provided

*Washer and dryer in unit

*Wi-Fi and cable TV

*Central air conditioning and ceiling fans

*Pack ’n play crib for infants and toddlers

*Parking for 2 vehicles (Memorial Day–Labor Day: 1 vehicle only)


We ask guests to bring beach towels, toiletries, and sunscreen so you’re ready to enjoy your time by the water.

There’s truly something for everyone here. Guests love surfing, kayaking, paddleboarding, biking, and long walks along the shore. The nearby Carolina Beach Boardwalk is a local favorite with great food, fun shops, an amusement park in the summer, and the must-try Britt’s Donuts.

During the summer months, the area comes alive with activities: Thursday night fireworks at the boardwalk, Friday evening outdoor concerts at Fort Fisher State Park, Saturday farmers markets, and Sunday night movies at the lake.

Just a short drive away, Fort Fisher offers an award-winning aquarium, the Southport Ferry for a scenic ride across the Cape Fear River, and the Fort Fisher Civil War Museum—all great options for a day off the beach.

We hope our condo feels like your home away from home and becomes a place you’ll want to return to year after year.

Guest access
You’ll have full, private access to the entire condo during your stay—this is your home away from home. The only spaces not accessible are two locked owner’s closets, one on the front porch and one in the bunk room.

We’ll send you the keypad entry codes on the day of arrival so check-in is easy and contact-free.

**Parking notes (please read carefully)**

★Memorial Day weekend–Labor Day weekend: parking is limited to one vehicle, and one parking pass will be provided.

★Rest of the year: parking is available for two vehicles with two passes

★Any additional vehicles will need off-site parking arrangements

★The HOA strictly enforces parking rules, and towing may occur for violations. Unfortunately, this is outside of our control and not the responsibility of the host.

If you have questions before arrival, we’re always happy to help make your stay smooth and stress-free!

Other things to note
The condo is on an elevated first floor with just 10 steps total to reach the front door (5 steps to a landing, then 5 more). The steps are wide with a sturdy railing, making access easier than many oceanfront units.

★This is a strictly non-smoking property. Smoking is not permitted inside the condo, on the deck, or anywhere on the property.

★No pets allowed. This helps us keep the space comfortable for guests with allergies.

★Any violation of the no-smoking or no-pet policy will result in a $500 hypoallergenic cleaning fee and may lead to immediate removal from the property. Please note that early eviction does not qualify for a refund of rent or security deposit.

Parking:

Off-season: two parking spaces are available

Memorial Day weekend–Labor Day weekend: parking is limited to one vehicle

We appreciate your understanding and cooperation—these guidelines help us keep the condo clean, safe, and enjoyable for everyone who stays with us.

listing_name: Classic Beach Cottage
description:
Quaint beach cottage in quiet neighborhood, four blocks to beach. Two bedrooms; an open living area - perfect for a small family (4-6 max) or 4 adults comfortably. Walking distance to beach, Carolina Beach Lake, Saturday farmers market (May-September), and elementary school play yard. Enjoy screened-in front porch, back deck and private back yard. Downtown Carolina Beach & Boardwalk - 6 blocks away. Home is close enough to the beach, but far enough from the main drag to be quiet and comfortable.

The space
Step back in time! Classic beach cottage, very private and relaxing (Circa 1936) located in quiet neighborhood just 4 blocks from the beach. Recommend a wagon or beach cart to carry your items to the beach if you plan to walk. Parking close to beach access can be challenging (and pricey) Free parking directly in front of Cottage. Cottage offers convenient enclosed outdoor shower (with hot and cold water) on private back deck makes washing off from the sandy beach and the wave crashes a breeze!

Must be 21 years of age or older to book the Cottage.

Guest access
Fully functional kitchen. Dishwasher/Microwave/Coffee Pot/Stove/Oven/Refrigerator. Because kitchen does not have exhaust fan, deep fried cooking is discouraged. Light stove-top cooking and baking is fine. Nice private backyard, perfect for storing your bicycles/surf boards/beach gear. Outdoor shower on back deck with hot and cold water. There is a queen size sofa bed in living room and a mattress pad and sheets available if you plan on using it. Sheets and towels are there for your use and are provided clean and made up on beds. Some visitors prefer to use their own linens. Please let me know prior to your visit if you will be bringing your own so that the beds will not be made up. When you depart, I ask that you please put sheets and towels in laundry basket located in large bedroom closet for the cleaning crew to launder.

Other things to note
• Roku TV. Use the remote to turn power on and off and volume control. You can select the streaming network of your choice or stream your preferred shows or movies with your smart phone or computer. Wifi is provided however, the internet service that Charter Spectrum provides is not very reliable and goes out often causing interruptions to your streaming efforts. Many island residents are hopeful that it will improve someday!

• Please let me know prior to your visit if you will be bringing your own linens so that the beds will not be made up with sheets that are provided.

• There is free parallel parking directly in front of the cottage enough for 2 vehicles, between the street and the sidewalk on the grassy/pine straw berm and a parking spot available across the street. Please do not park vehicles in the yard as the ground is soft and the weight of a vehicle will cause ruts.

• Parking Permits can be purchased from Town Hall.
$25/Day or $100/Week; otherwise the fee to park in the various town parking lots or parking spaces is $5/Hour.

• There are a few beach chairs available there for your use.

• Must be 21 years of age or older to book the Cottage.

• The Cottage is not suitable for pets of any kind.

• An enhanced cleaning and disinfectant routine is in place as well as a minimum of 48 hours between guests.

This 3 bedroom, 2 bath Classic Beach Cottage is the perfect spot for your Carolina Beach getaway.

The space
We have been renting since 2006 & have had many return renters every year. We cater to families but welcome singles that are mindful of the neighbors next door. We can accommodate families up to 8 people adults & children. We have Queen beds in the 3 bedrooms, The trundle bed pulls out & sleeps two. The couch has a queen pull out bed.

Carolina Beach has a wonderful fireworks show every Thursday night. There is a free movie for the kids down next to the lake on Sunday night. listing_name: 3 bed 2 Bath Oceanfront Beach Condo!
description:
Completely renovated and ready to host guests with a coastal contemporary charm, this condo is the nicest on the beach! With around 3 bedrooms 2 baths and 1200 square feet of space, this home can comfortably accommodate 6 adults and 2 children (8 Max). Located on the middle floor of the complex, the deck provides amazing views over the ocean dunes for beautiful morning sunrises.

The space
Coastal Contemporary condo that has been completely renovated (2018). With 3 beds and 2 baths and 1200 Sqft, condo is perfect for groups and families.

Guest access
Pool, private beach access, private deck

Other things to note
Parking is limited. guests are restricted to two (2) vehicles. There are 3 parking bays for C&D units under building that are communal and un-assigned. Guests must pull vehicles all the way to front and leave placard on dash with contact info (cell #) so when blocking other guests vehicles they can contact you to move. It is recommend that you choose one (1) vehicle as primary mode of transportation for duration of stay and coordinate with fellow guests on parking secondary vehicles all the way up in parking bay for convenience (unless you want to play move that vehicle all week!) There is also a public pay parking lot north of condo that can be utilized. Uber/Lyft/Taxi is also a very good means of transportation on Island

Frequently Asked Questions;

Parking - Unit is allow two (2) vehicles and can only park in C or D bays under condo. Parking is NOT reserved and each vehicle must display contact placard provided in condo in case vehicle needs to be moved. Parking is tight, so some full size vehicles might not fit (Vehicles with lifts, or dually tires) I can park a full size truck with little issue under unit. Suggestion would be to designate 1 vehicle as the main transportation source for week and try and use Uber or walk as much as possible to avoid having to play musical vehicles the entire week.

Linens and Towels - one (1) set of linens per bed and one (1) set of towels and wash clothes will be provided per person.

Balconies/ Decks- each room has a balcony, but the Master bedroom is the only one that has an ocean view. The master balcony is also connected to the main entrance balcony (egress to enter unit) but has a separate sliding glass door entrance.

Wi-fi/ Internet and streaming cable- wifi is free and each room has a tv that can stream cable or other apps (Ie Netflix, Amazon...etc) to it via a ROKU powered Tv.

Basics Items --Toilet Paper, Paper Towels cleaning supplies, condiments, seasoning etc - I will provide basics to start off your trip with, but it is on the renter to stock supplies for the remainder of their visit. I am hoping in foster a 'Pay it Forward\ system where guest can leave there non perishable foods
room_type: etc for the next guest so not to waste perfectly good items. Also
cover_photo_url: if you see that an item is running low or out
photos_count:
please add to your grocery cart for the next guest!

Beach Chairs and Deck Chairs - 8 beach chairs will be provided. There will be deck chairs as well.

Grocery Stores- There is only 2 super markets on the island and they become very busy on Saturdays. To avoid this and maximize time on the beach
photo_urls: Harris Teeter and Publix both offer online shopping for pick up or delivery for small fee. Shop order 24 to 48 hours to check in to assure time slot is available."

listing_name: Condo 1 block to ocean & pickleball y’all
description:
3 bedrooms 2 1/2 baths with canal views 1 block to ocean. Access to an indoor pickleball facility in Wilmington, NC with discounts. Check us out at Pickle & Taps. We truly want to make our place an affordable family friendly destination for travelers that will treat our home like it’s their own. We hope your first experience with us turns into repeat visits for years to come. Reach out with questions or if there is something specific you need. You need to be at least 25 to rent the condo.

The space
3 bedrooms 2 1/2 baths. There is a master suite with a king bed and a pack and play located in the master closet. The two remaining bedrooms share a jack and jill bathroom. Bedroom 1 has full over full bed and the second bedroom is a twin over full bunk bed with a twin trundle. The house is fully furnished and the kitchen is fully stocked. Bath towels, sheets, pillows, and blankets are provided. Each bathroom has body wash, shampoo, conditioner (Suave Brand), hair dryer, and laundry baskets. There are hangers and shelves in every closet to store your clothing. There is a full size washer and dryer, ironing board, extra seating for outside, and basic cleaning and laundry supplies. There is also a game closet with books, art supplies, and various games for you to enjoy.
*You will need to bring items for the beach. Cooler, beach towels, umbrellas, boards, chairs, etc..

Guest access
We are the top unit of only two units. There are 3 sets of steps up to our unit door. Beautiful balcony to enjoy the water views. Outside there is shared water hose to rinse your personal items. The unit also has an outdoor closet to store your beach items. To help minimize sand in the condo, please store all beach items in the closet designated for unit two downstairs.

Other things to note
There is parking designated for unit 2 that could accommodate 3 cars one behind the other. Please do not block the driveway for the other unit owners.

listing_name: Salty Toones
description:
Newly Renovated and Tastefully Decorated 2 BR/2 BA Oceanfront Condo, sleeps 8.

LOCATION, LOCATION & VIEWS. Located in Carolina Beach this newly renovated, spotless, Winds V1 condo is located on Carolina Beach Ave N, JUST A FEW BLOCKS FROM THE BOARDWALK, RESTAURANTS AND SHOPPING. The living room and deck offer expansive views of the Atlantic Ocean. The master bedroom patio offers beautiful sunset views over the canal.

The space
The property offers a COMMUNITY POOL, BEACH ACCESS and COVERED PARKING (2 car limit). Cable TV and WI-FI internet access are included. The master bedroom offers a king sized bed, TV and adjoining bath. The second bedroom offers 2 full sized beds and TV. The living room offers a full sized sleeper sofa. Leave the dirty laundry to us. BED LINENS AND TOWELS/WASHCLOTHS ARE PROVIDED FOR YOUR CONVENIENCE. You will only need to bring beach towels. The kitchen is well appointed with all of the cooking items you will need. We also have a washer and dryer. This property is STRICTLY **NON-SMOKING indoors or out. ** We are implementing extra cleaning and disinfecting practices between stays. We are also allowing 24 hours between stays. Book your vacation ASAP and check out all that \Salty Toones\" has to offer."

listing_name: Abundance in the Sand
description:
The first story of a three story structure, this 3 bed 2 bath home is light, modern and airy.

Hosted by Abundance Vacation Rentals, staying here is a dream: beachfront views and access to the shore by our structure’s private boardwalk with foot hose, outdoor shower and benches.

You will have the ocean out front and the lake with farmers market, paddle boats and playground out back.

We even have a child’s play house swing and slide on the sand.

The space
This is a duplex You have full use of the first floor home and it is completely private from the other unit. You do partially share the deck. you do need to go up one flight of stairs to get to this unit, as the carport is on the first level. It is fully self contained. There is another unit that occupies the upper two floors, and they will share the parking below the house and the boardwalk out to the ocean.

Guest access
You have full access to the first floor home and porch. There is a lovely child’s play area on the sand below the boardwalk with slide, swing and clubhouse. That is available to everyone in the house. There are full laundry facilities inside the home. You may also store your boards, bikes and beach chairs below the house in the carport.

Other things to note
We also supply the following for each property:
A starter kit of one roll of toilet paper per bathroom, one roll of paper towels, a trash bag, and dish soap. We also supply laundered bed linens, comforters, and 1 bathing towel and wash cloth per person. We do not supply any beach gear or beach towel. We have great rental companies on the island we would be more than happy to share the info with you. We also do not supply laundry detergent, body soap or shampoo/conditioner as we find everyone has their own preferences for these =) Please review our house rules prior to your stay



There is a Beach re-nourishment done in Carolina and Kure beach every 3 years. This helps to keep our beaches safe from erosion. Please note that we have no control over this project and that it is normally concluded by May, but there is a possibility of delays.

listing_name: SeaScape-Top Floor Ocean Views & Dips in the Pool!
description:
You'll love sipping coffee and watching the sunset from the front deck of this beautiful and much sought after 3rd floor ocean view condo with private pool and a beach access is just a short walk away. This NON-SMOKING condo includes, 2 flat screen SmartTVs, cable, & private WiFi. The kitchen contains all essential tool, a limited amount of spices/staples. There's also a Keurig with a variety of coffee pods for your enjoyment. The queen sofa bed sleeps 2 comfortably. No pets are allowed.

The space
For your trip to the beach (about 1-2 block walk from the unit) we have some beach chairs and sand toys for the little ones!

A high chair and Pack 'n Play will make life easy for young parents.

Our quiet building has its own private pool, including lounge chairs and a shower for rinsing off after the beach.

Private parking is located under the building and in the surface parking lots on either side of the building.

Guest access
IMPORTANT note about parking: you MUST display the parking permit (found inside the Welcome Binder) on your dash or risk being towed. We would never tow you but the HOA allows a wrecker service to patrol and remove vehicles without a parking pass. Please return all parking passes to the unit upon leaving. The fee for a replacement pass is $75.

Guests have full access to the entire condo including laundry room and porches. Off street parking and community pool are shared.

Other things to note
The sofa in the living room converts to a queen-sized bed with ample room for 2 adults or children.

We would love your feedback. Please contact us with any concerns or issues prior to leaving a negative review. We want to make your stay as comfortable as possible. If something comes up, we want to make it right! Please don't hesitate to reach out to us.

Please NO Pets. You will be charged a $200 cleaning fee if there is evidence of pets in our unit. We have family members with serious pet allergies.

description:
Welcome to The Endless Summer CB Condo! Whether you're visiting Carolina Beach as a couple, with family, or a group of friends, The Endless Summer CB is your perfect oceanfront paradise!

The home has been designed with all of our guests' comfort in mind. Enjoy breathtaking views from your spacious patio or the miles of pristine coastline just steps away with a private beach access. Minutes to downtown CB, the Boardwalk, restaurants, and more!

The space
This condo is located in one of the newest OCEANFRONT COMPLEXES in all of Carolina Beach!!! Perfectly located in town, The Endless Summer gives you everything you need on your vacation to Carolina Beach. With 2 large bedrooms, each with their own full bath, and a double bed pull-out sofa in the living room, the condo can sleep 5-6 people comfortably. The unit is located on the second story of a three-story complex with an unassigned shared parking area for the complex underneath (2 cars per-unit). Please be aware there is NO ELEVATOR in the complex, but just two easy flights of stairs required to reach your Endless Summer Oasis!

The Endless Summer condo has been curated personally with our guests' ultimate comfort in mind. You will find a fully equipped kitchen with stainless steel appliances including a dishwasher and all the utensils required to cook a delicious meal and dine-in. This includes (but is not limited to): a large coffee maker and complimentary ground Colombian coffee, tea kettle, toaster, blender, plates, bowls, flatware, cooking utensils, mugs, wine glasses, large refrigerator with ice maker, a Henckels knife set, cutting boards, cheese knives, pots & pans, dish towels, basic spices, a water purifier, & small cooler to take to the beach, & BBQ grilling tools. We expect nothing should be missing but if there is, just let us know!

The floor plan is spacious and located all on a single level after entering, allowing for an abundance of natural light from both East & West.

The Dining Room has a round table with seating for 4 (with 2 extra fold-away chairs in the Master Bedroom closet) and ocean views.

listing_name: Great ocean views, across the street pricing
description:
Updated 6br 4ba beach house in the heart of Carolina Beach. Right across the street from the beach access. Memory foam mattresses on all beds and fresh paint throughout. Roku-enabled TVs in all the bedrooms and the main living room, and there's a keypad lock so no worrying about who has the keys.

The space
The house is 1/2 a duplex (each side is 6br 4ba) and very close to the ocean. I keep it very clutter-free, and a little more modern but still a little beachy.

Guest access
You have the whole house

Other things to note
There's a keypad lock so for coming and going you don't have to manage keys.

linens are provided, and spare paper products and extra kitchen accessories are stored in the closet of the upstairs hall bath.
