listing_name: Carolina beach home with view of saltwater pool
description:
Imagine Sea salt colors, natural bamboo tones in contemporary zen tommy Bahama tropical pool house. Home is located walking distance to sunrises on the ocean boardwalk and sunset walks on trails along the Cape Fear river. Walk/bike to beach, local farmers market on lake, watch fireworks in the summer, visit aquarium, and catch ferry to Southport or even Bald Head Island. Basque in the sun, take a nap, or read a book to cool off in salt water pool! (PlZ NO KIDS/1-2 ADULTS MAX CAP no exception)

The space
This home is unique due to the bike/walk path in front of home that takes one to the beach, northeast cape fear river, grocery store and many restaurants. It's a quiet and serene spot that has a tropical feel and spa like sensation to rest and relax. Yoga is offered in biking distance seasonally on the beach and year round studio. Natural trails all through the state park are next to the property to enjoy!

Guest access
The entire pool guest home/apartment is private. The saltwater pool is shared. I have 2 air B and B guest homes on property. The pool is shared with myself and guest. I make every attempt to be mindful of your privacy and space.

Other things to note
THE SPACE IS DESIGNED for “1-2 ADULT GUESTS MAXIMUM (no exception)”. Please be sure to have reservation match with exact number in reservation. The home is for the guests ONLY on reservation please. BIKES ARE NO LONGER PROVIDED DUE TO TRAVELING AND UNABLE TO UPKEEP WITH SALT AIR DAMAGE. It is appreciated to provide estimated ETA, names in party, make/model of vehicle. My home is detached and is on the other side of property. For safety and optimal experience, I like to have this information for communication and clarity. I thank you in advance for your cooperation.

listing_name: Luna Sea l 3 mins walk to the CB Boardwalk
description:
Visit Carolina Beach and live like a local in the heart of beautiful Pleasure Island. Everything you need for an amazing beach vacation is within walking distance from the Luna-Sea, including the beach, boardwalk, gazebo, lake, and a multitude of amazing restaurants, pubs and shops. You can relax after a long day at the beach with video-streaming capability and fast Wi-Fi. Enjoy the evening ocean breeze on the huge, screened in front porch.

The space
You have access to a 3 bedroom, 2.5 bathroom home with fenced yard. We love dogs, we do have a $150 ($50 for additional dogs) deposit if you are bringing your furry friend. If you’re a history buff, you would be interested to know that part of the Luna-Sea was formerly a World War II era barrack from Ft. Fisher Air Force Base

Guest access
You will have access to the entire house with screened front porch and fenced back yard.

Other things to note
The minimum age to rent is 25 years old.

There is no smoking or vaping of any kind permitted in the home, on the front porch or backyard.

You will have the following items to help you feel at home:
1 roll of paper towels
2 rolls of toilet paper per bathroom
garbage bags
dishsoap
dishwasher pods
hand soap
Sponge

Coverlets for all beds
Sheets for all beds
one towel/wash cloth per guest
hand towels for bathroom and kitchen.
We understand accidents happen, we provide our own linens, they are inspected by our linen team and cleaning team before and after each guest.
If the linens are damaged during your stay you will be charged the following per item:
Bath towels $5 (each)
Fitted sheet: $5 (each)
Flat sheet: $5 (each)
Pillow cases: $3 (each)
Coverlets: $20 (each)
Mattress toppers/protector: $20 (each).
We appreciate you, please treat our home like your own!

listing_name: Kraken's Den ★ Oceanview ★ Steps to ocean ★ Pool
description:
Steps from the ocean and near of the heart of Carolina Beach, this uniquely decorated condo is a wonderful spot to enjoy your beach vacation. Close to restaurants, shops, the Aquarium, Ft. Fisher historical site, and many other attractions, you will love the location and the relaxation of The Kraken's Den!

Our husband and wife team at “My CB Vacation” hopes to provide you with a wonderful vacation experience at Carolina Beach. We look forward to making your stay an experience to remember!

The space
You will have the entire condo to yourself. The Kraken's Den is located on the 3rd floor of a well-maintained condo complex. The balcony overlooks the ocean and the main street.

The bed is a memory foam queen mattress with comfortable firm pillows and a down duvet. You will have use of all items in the condo. If more than two people are staying with you, please let us know to arrange additional linens for the queen pullout sofa and towels. Additional guests over 2 incur an added fee for linens and towels. If you only have two guests, but one is planning to sleep on the sofa bed, please let us know in advance, in order to add the linen fee and make sure the bed is made.

We provide wooden beach chairs and an umbrella set up for you daily in the high season from Memorial Day to Labor Day weekends, and every reservation receives all linens and towels for the number of guests booked. If you need extra, let us know. You will also have water on arrival and a Keurig with several varieties of coffee and tea and accoutrements.

Please note: there is only space for one vehicle in the Kraken's Den parking lot. Additional vehicles must be parked on the street or in a public lot.

The pool is generally open from mid-April through mid-October.

Guest access
You will have access to the entire condo and the pool. You will also receive a parking tag for your vehicle to park in the Sea Mist lot. We only have a tag for 1 vehicle, but there is paid parking nearby.

Other things to note
We have created a unique app guidebook for the condo and the Carolina Beach area that will give you lots of ideas and suggestions about restaurants, activities, local info, dog rules and the dog park, and many more fun things.

We also have partnered with Tony Silvagni Surf School to provide our guests with a high quality wooden umbrella and 2 wooden chairs that Tony's team will set up on the beach for you every day from 9am-5pm during the summer season (Memorial Day- Labor Day). He also will extend a 10% discount to any other rental, tour or lesson you would like to book during your stay!

listing_name: Autumn Villas at Carolina Beach
description:
Experience the ultimate coastal getaway in this exceptional beach condo, positioned right across from Carolina Beach. The top-floor unit offers privacy and breathtaking ocean views, complemented by a spacious loft ideal for relaxation. Decorated with charming tropical accents, it serves as a perfect sanctuary for unwinding and recharging. Guests can enjoy exclusive access to two community pools, enhancing their vacation experience. Conveniently located at the peaceful end of the pleasure island.

The space
Our beach condo is ideally located at the peaceful end of Pleasure Island, allowing you to enjoy the tranquility you desire while being just a quick bike ride or golf cart cruise away from the vibrant dining and entertainment options at Carolina Beach.

This spacious and fully furnished unit is perfect for both short and long-term vacations. As the largest and highest unit in the building, you can relax knowing that you’re elevated from any potential flooding or waves, all while taking in breathtaking views of the stunning blue ocean.

The master suite features a luxurious king bed, while the second bedroom includes a comfortable queen bed, with a full bath conveniently located just across the hall. Upstairs, the loft offers an additional king bed and a queen bed, making it an excellent choice for families or groups. Our home comes fully equipped for your everyday needs—just bring your beach towels and sandals!

We also offer a unique wine and book exchange system: enjoy a bottle of wine, leave a bottle, or take a book and replace it with another. Each wine bottle is valued at $20, and each book at $15. Our goal is to ensure you and your family have the ultimate experience at our beach house. If you forget to replace any wine or book, a charge will be automatically added to your credit card on file.

Guest access
Guests have full access to the entire house, so you won't need to worry about carrying a house key. Our advanced keyless entry system guarantees a smooth experience; you will receive your passcode one day before your arrival.

**Beach Access**
Our property provides easy access to the beach, located just to the right of the Sun Skipper blue building. Enjoy the convenience!

**Pool Access**
Our community features two pools: one located behind our building's garage and the other just a few steps away in the Sun Skipper D building.

Other things to note
We truly want you to feel at home in our lovely space, where you can relax, catch your breath, and immerse yourself in the calming sounds of the ocean waves while diving into a good book by the shore.

**Please keep in mind that our charming house is situated on the 3rd floor, and while you'll find 45 manageable steps leading up, we understand there is no elevator in the building. We promise that the breathtaking beach view and refreshing ocean breeze waiting for you at the top will make the climb more than worthwhile.

**To ensure the comfort and happiness of all our guests, we kindly maintain a one-pet policy, with a weight limit of 50 pounds. We warmly welcome hypoallergenic service dogs, so that everyone has the opportunity to relax and truly enjoy their stay with us.

This 5 bedroom, 4 bath open floor plan has hardwoods through the common areas with lots of natural lighting. listing_name: Penthouse | Low Rates | Elevator |Ocean/Canal View
description:
Enjoy beautiful casual elegance at The Penthouse at the Beach! Private Elevator to Penthouse Level. No stair climbing to enjoy incredible views of both ocean and canal. Huge Rooms, dining room, screened-in porch, Entire top floor all one level, 3 bedrooms & 3 full baths, sleeping 8 comfortably. Easy access to beach across the street, close walks to restaurants and boardwalk. Linens/towels provided, Washer/Dryer. Free WIFI. Perfect Getaway!! (Just bring swimsuits!) You will love it here!

The space
This is a beautiful place to stay at the beach! This top floor Penthouse has gorgeous views from almost every room and easy keyless access. The private elevator allows easy unloading and unpacking., ample parking for 4 vehicles; 2 Guest Rooms have private doors to private deck overlooking the beach or relax on the screened in porch to enjoy beautiful sunsets over the canal. Gas fireplace allows for special cozy nights in spacious living room with Roku smart TV. (So dont forget your Netflix/Hulu/Prime passwords).

The kitchen is well equipped with a bar seating for 4 plus kitchen bistro set. Beautiful separate dining room is set for 6. Two additional folding chairs provided in closet. Two Bedrooms have walk in closets; third bedroom has double closet. All bedrooms have luggage stands. Linens and Towels provided.

Enjoy all Carolina Beach has to offer, including free movie night at the Carolina Beach Lake Park on Sunday nights all summer; fireworks on Thursday nights(Summer), World Famous Britt's donuts, and the best restaurants including Michaels' Seafood Restaurant, Havana's, The Tropical, Shuckin’ Shack, and Nikki's Sushi. Boardwalk provides fun people watching, with several watering holes, arcade, carnival, and more in the summer months!! Farmer's Market every Saturday around the Lake!

Special info will be given for operation of the elevator, as well as key codes will be given after booking. You will enjoy this beautiful setting.

The is a non smoking & non vaping unit!

listing_name: Canal View Porch • 1-Min Walk to Beach • Parking
description:
Canal Drive beach cottage positioned between the ocean and canal in Carolina Beach. The public beach access is about a 1-minute walk (100 yards) at the end of the street, and the covered canal-view porch is perfect for watching boats travel between the marina and Intracoastal.

The Carolina Beach Marina (fishing charters & Stoked Restaurant) is a short walk away, and the Carolina Beach Boardwalk — home to Britt’s Donuts, restaurants, shops, and tiki bars — is about 0.6 miles away.

The space
This classic 1940s Carolina Beach cottage sits on a corner lot just a 1-minute walk to the beach access (about 100 yards) while offering canal and marina views from the covered front porch. The porch and stairs were recently rebuilt and have quickly become one of our favorite spots at the house. From here you can watch boats and yachts come and go across the canal while enjoying beautiful sunset skies over the marina.

The home is also located close to the Carolina Beach marina, where many local fishing charters depart for offshore and inshore trips. Whether you’re heading out for a day of fishing or simply enjoy watching the boats return in the evening, the marina activity adds to the relaxed coastal atmosphere of the neighborhood.

The cottage maintains the relaxed charm of a traditional beach home with comfortable living spaces throughout. The dining room and shared bathroom were added to the original home, which creates a small step down (about 1 inch) from the main living area into that space.

You enter the home from the covered front porch using your custom digital lock code.

LIVING ROOM
The living room is a comfortable space to relax after a day at the beach. It includes a sofa with chaise, two swivel chairs, and additional seating that’s perfect for reading. A large smart TV allows you to log in to your streaming services or watch cable through the Spectrum app. Board games and beach towels are stored in the cabinet below the TV, and a small desk provides a convenient spot if you need to work during your stay.

BEDROOMS
All three bedrooms are located just off the living room.

Primary Bedroom
The primary bedroom features a king bed with a very plush, body-contouring memory foam mattress that you sink into when you lie down, creating a cozy hug-like feel. A sliding glass door opens directly onto the covered porch with views of the canal. This room includes a Roku smart TV for streaming or cable through the Spectrum app. The en-suite bathroom is compact with a stand-up shower. The bathroom door is a barn-style louvered door that slides closed for privacy but does not lock.

Second Bedroom
The second bedroom includes a full-size bed, dresser, luggage rack, chair, and closet. A Roku TV allows access to streaming services or cable through the Spectrum app.

Third Bedroom
The third bedroom features a twin-over-full bunk bed. The top bunk is intended for children with a maximum weight capacity of 125 lbs. This room also includes a TV and a closet where you will find the pack and play, extra blankets, broom, and vacuum. The bunk room also has a door connecting directly to the shared bathroom.

KITCHEN
The kitchen is equipped with pots, pans, utensils, serving pieces, children’s dinnerware, and wine glasses. Appliances include a stove, oven, microwave, dishwasher, refrigerator with top freezer, toaster, blender, kettle, and both a Keurig and traditional drip coffee maker. We do not provide spices or oils, so please plan to bring your own.

DINING ROOM
The dining room is bright and surrounded by windows with views of the canal. The table seats six with a bench and additional chairs, making it a great place to gather for meals while watching boats pass by.

SHARED BATHROOM
The shared bathroom is accessed from both the dining room and the bunk room and includes a large stand-up shower with handheld wand. Each bathroom in the home includes a hair dryer.

PORCH
The covered front porch is one of the favorite gathering spots at the house. Relax on the outdoor sofa and chairs or enjoy a meal at the tall table while watching boats move through the canal and the marina across the water. A small gas grill is also available on the porch for guest use.

UNDER THE HOME
Covered parking is available under the home for up to three vehicles. The laundry room and beach storage area are also located downstairs.

You’ll find beach chairs, umbrellas, beach toys, a boogie board, a beach cart, and bikes available for guest use. Inventory may vary slightly as items occasionally break or guests leave additional equipment.

Behind the home you’ll find a hot and cold outdoor shower, perfect for rinsing off after the beach. A retractable clothesline is also available for drying swimsuits and towels.

BABY & TODDLER ITEMS
For guests traveling with little ones, the home includes a pack and play (please bring a sheet), booster seat, training potty, toddler toys, children’s dishes, and porch stair gates. These items are stored in the bunk room closet and downstairs storage area.

Guest access
Guests have access to the entire home.

The main living space is located upstairs on one level and includes the living room, kitchen, dining area, three bedrooms, and two bathrooms.

The primary bathroom is very small and has a barn-style louvered door that slides closed for privacy but does not lock.

Under the home is the covered parking area along with the laundry room and beach storage area. This is where you’ll find the beach cart, beach chairs, umbrellas, boogie boards, toys, and bikes available for guest use.

The outdoor shower is also located behind the home on the ground level and is perfect for rinsing off sand after the beach.

Other things to note
SLEEPING CAPACITY
The third bedroom has a twin-over-full bunk bed. The top bunk is intended for children and has a maximum weight capacity of 125 lbs. Because of this, the home is best suited for a maximum of 6 adults.

PARKING
Carolina Beach is a popular destination, and on busy weekends visitors sometimes look for parking in nearby residential areas. Parking for this home is under the house for up to three vehicles.

There is a rope that can be placed across the parking entry to help keep the space reserved for guests staying at the house. You are welcome to use it if you'd like, but it is not required. Please drive carefully when pulling in, as the rope can be harder to see at night.

STARTER SUPPLIES
We provide a starter set of household supplies so you don’t have to rush to the store when you arrive. This includes 2 rolls of toilet paper, 1 roll of paper towels, hand soap, dish soap, dishwasher detergent, laundry soap, shampoo, conditioner, and body wash.

These items are intended to help you get settled and are not meant to last for an entire stay, so you may want to plan to bring additional supplies or pick some up during your trip.

KING TIDES & FLOODING
During certain king tide events, parts of Canal Drive can experience temporary tidal flooding. The home sits on the corner of Canal Drive and Sailfish, which provides access in and out via Sailfish when higher tides occur.

During the largest king tide since we’ve owned the home, water briefly reached about one foot under the house, which then receded as the tide went back out. Guests interested in tide timing can search online for the Carolina Beach King Tide schedule.

listing_name: Oceanfront ★ Pool ★ Elevator ★ Boardwalk
description:
The ocean is steps from your door, and the condo is in the heart of the world famous Carolina Beach boardwalk! You can't get closer to the restaurants and shops. Leave your car and walk everywhere!

In addition to the oceanfront view and access, you will have access to the pool, private parking, and laundry.

Our husband and wife team at “My CB Vacation” hopes to provide you with a wonderful vacation experience at Carolina Beach. We look forward to making your stay an experience to remember!

The space
You will have the entire condo to yourself. The condo is accessible by elevator or stairs, and you will have no better view than oceanfront! Watch the dolphins swim by, the waves break, or enjoy the weekly fireworks show just above you. The property is entirely handicap accessible!

The bed is a memory foam queen mattress with comfortable pillows and a down duvet. You will have use of all items in the condo. If more than two people are staying with you, please let us know to arrange additional linens for the queen pullout sofa (also memory foam mattress) and towels. Additional guests over 2 incur an added fee for linens and towels. If you only have two guests, but one is planning to sleep on the sofa bed, please let us know in advance, in order to add the linen fee and make sure the bed is made.

We provide wooden beach chairs and an umbrella set up for you daily in the high season from Memorial Day to Labor Day, and every guest receives all linens and towels for the number of guests booked. If you need extra, let us know. You will also have water on arrival and a Keurig with several varieties of coffee, tea and accoutrements.

The pool is open from May 1-October 15.

This condo has been designed to provide a feel of relaxation and enjoyment in all aspects, and we are sure you will love hanging out at Carolina Beach!

Guest access
You will have access to the entire condo and the pool. There is also a laundry room. You will receive a parking tag for your vehicle to park in one of three lots. We only provide a tag for 1 vehicle, but there is paid parking nearby, or you can purchase an additional pass prior to your trip.

Other things to note
We have created a unique app guidebook for the condo and the Carolina Beach area that will give you lots of ideas and suggestions about restaurants, activities, local info, and many more fun things.

We also have partnered with Tony Silvagni Surf School to provide our guests with a high quality wooden umbrella and 2 wooden chairs that Tony's team will set up on the beach for you every day from 9am-5pm between Memorial Day and Labor Day. He also will extend a 10% discount to any other rental, tour or lesson you would like to book during your stay!

listing_name: Point Break Historic Beach Cottage
description:
Point Break is a 1940's beach cottage that has been lovingly restored to preserve the charm of a nostalgic beach house but with modern comforts such as new HVAC, full kitchen, outdoor shower and commercial hot water heater. Conveniently located 50 steps from the beach and directly across the street from Tony Silvagni's surf school and beach equipment rental shop. There is no need to get in your car once you arrive.
The house is pet friendly and there is a $75 pet fee.

The space
The historic beach cottage has original bead board walls and hardwood floors all carefully restored. The common areas are spacious and comfortable. The front porch has comfy chairs and a table for dining and enjoying the ocean breezes.

The house sleeps 6 in well appointed bedrooms complete with Casper mattresses and a futon bunk room.

There is wifi in the home and tv has a Roku device so you can access your Netflix, Amazon and Hulu etc. channels.

The kitchen is fully equipped with a full sized refrigerator, oven and microwave for cooking meals at home.

Comforters and pillows are provided but we do not provide sheets or towels and this is reflected in the rate. Most people bring their own or Seaside Linens can rent linens and we are happy to assist in any way.

Friendly pets are welcome however there is a $75 pet fee.

Parking for up to three cars is not an issue as long as your vehicle is not oversized and can fit down a narrow driveway.

Guest access
Guests have full access to the home and yard.

Other things to note
We do not provide sheets or towels - pillows and comforters are provided. Additionally we are taking all CDC recommended cleaning and disinfecting steps between guests. Seaside Linens can rent linens and we are happy to assist in any way.

Let us know if you plan to bring a pet.

Enjoy your trip!!

listing_name: Charming Cottage, Walk to Beach, Porch, Parking
description:
Charming Carolina Beach Cottage – Walk to Beach, Boardwalk & More!
This upgraded 1900s cottage is in the heart of Carolina Beach—just 2 blocks from the ocean, boardwalk, restaurants, and shops. Central to all things CB, yet tucked on a quiet street.

Unwind on the breezy front porch, then explore local favorites or take a short drive to Fort Fisher, the aquarium, or downtown Wilmington.

We love this home and the easygoing CB vibe—and we hope you’ll feel like a local the moment you arrive.

The space
Full Private Access + Optional Bikes
Guests have full access to the entire home. Bikes are available at no extra charge—just let us know at least a week before check-in so we can make sure they’re ready for you and not in use.

Guest access
Guests have full access to the entire home and private backyard.

Other things to note
Thoughtfully Stocked & Personally Loved

This Carolina Beach cottage isn’t just a vacation rental—it’s our personal getaway. Because we enjoy the home ourselves, you’ll find a few of our favorite things throughout: well-loved books, cozy throw blankets, classic games and puzzles, and kitchen staples like olive oil, tea, and condiments.

We’re intentional about what we leave behind. If an item is unopened, in good condition, and likely useful to future guests, we keep it stocked to help reduce waste and save you time and money. Anything expired or past its prime is removed.

Our goal is to offer a space that’s welcoming, eco-conscious, and feels like a home away from home—not just a place to stay.

listing_name: Harlow Hideaway - Steps to the Beach
description:
Key-less entry system which allows hassle-free check in at any hour of the day or night. Two parking spaces included and additional nearby parking available for a fee. Pool. Walking distance to everything. Minimum age to book is 21 years.

The space
Three bedroom, two bathroom townhome directly across the street from the beach. Sleeps 7 in beds, 9 with the use of the blow up mattress. Large balcony with ocean view and townhome also has a pool (shared with 8 other units). Harlow Hideaway has the perfect location as it is located between the boardwalk and the North End of Carolina Beach. Walk to the boardwalk where you will find multiple shops, restaurants (including the famous Britt's Donuts), bars and some carnival rides OR walk to the North End where you can build fires and use one of our coolers to bring your own alcoholic beverages (just no glass) to drink on the beach. Public beach access is about two buildings down on either side of the townhome.

Comes with 2 covered parking spaces right outside of the ground access, where you will find an outdoor shower, beach accessories for your use, and a full size washer and dryer. Above this is the newly renovated main living unit, where you will find the open concept kitchen with marble countertops, dining, living room, large balcony, and the first bathroom. All 3 bedrooms and the second bathroom are located on the 3rd level with hardwood floors.

Bedroom 1: Master bedroom with doorway directly into shared upstairs bathroom. Queen bed. Wall mounted smart TV.

Bedroom 2: Queen bedroom. Small TV.

Bedroom 3: Bunk beds - twin on the top and full on the bottom (sleeps 3 total).

Can use the provided blow up mattress to sleep 2 additional guests.

Take advantage of the beach view from the balcony while drinking your morning coffee made from our Keureg (small selection of k-cups included in stay). All linens are included in your stay, excluding beach towels and pack and play sheets.

Guest access
Guests have the entire property to themselves.

Other things to note
The pool is typically open from April - October each year with specific opening/closing dates set by the HOA and pool maintenance company. We have a very strict no animals policy. If you are found in violation of this policy there will be a $500 fee plus the cost of any additional cleaning/repairs related to the animal. There is also a $300 biohazard fee if our cleaning crew has to clean up urine, feces, vomit, blood, etc.

listing_name: 2nd Row with Pool & Backyard
description:
This sunny beach house is steps away from the ocean and located on the second row in beautiful Carolina Beach. It’s walking distance to the boardwalk and restaurants.

This 3 bedroom/3 bath duplex has a unique private pool shared with only 1 neighbor. Enjoy partial ocean and canal views. Perfect to watch the sunrise and set!

There is plenty of parking for 3-4 cars.

Enjoy a day at the beach or lounge at the pool surrounded by a beautiful palm tree landscape.

Perfect Location!

The space
—Good Vibes—

Walk up the stairs to a beautiful bright living room. The space has queen pull out couch with plenty of seating. Eat dinner on the balcony, outside by the pool or on the beach.

The 1st floor has a living room with smart tv, ocean facing balcony, kitchen with dishwasher, microwave, coffee maker, toaster & fold up kitchen table. There is a full bathroom and washer dryer. The first floor bedroom has a full/twin bunk bed.

The 2nd floor has a master bedroom with a full bathroom and a partial ocean view. The master balcony has a spiral staircase leading to a crow's nest with both ocean and canal views. Enjoy beautiful sunsets! The 3rd bedroom has pool and canal views with a full bathroom right next door.

We provide sheets, pillows, blankets, dish soap and an allotted amount of paper towels & toilet paper.

We do not provide beach towels or any beach equipment.

There are several companies on the island that rent these items. If you need help finding a company, just ask. We're happy to help!

Contact us if interested in the option to rent the entire house. We will provide you with the Air B & B link.

The backyard is a shared space with the other unit.

No parties
No smoking
No pets

Key Pad Entry
Check in 4:00 pm
Check out 10:00 am

Minimum Age Requirement- 25

Saturday-Saturday bookings during peak season

Guest access
Not Handicap Accessible

There is a staircase entry along with another staircase to access the 2nd and 3rd bedrooms.

Other things to note
We created many memories in Carolina Beach. Our goal is for you to have the same memorable experience on your vacation.

listing_name: Relaxing water view condo! Kid & Dog friendly
description:
Ideal for families, couples, or groups up to 6. Enjoy views of Snow's Cut canal from the open living room and kitchen area, and two spacious porches. Gather around the sectional couch for games and drinks while watching TV. Kitchen equipped for your culinary adventures with modern amenities and counter seating for 5. Ample parking available, including space for a boat trailer. Dog and kid-friendly with provided toys and books.

Watch the boats go by from the living room!

The space
Welcome to our cozy retreat boasting lovely water views! Tucked away near the Carolina Beach State Park trails, our condo offers a peaceful setting surrounded by nature. For water enthusiasts, the public boat ramp is a mere 2 blocks away, providing easy access to endless aquatic adventures.

Inside, you'll discover a haven of entertainment and comfort. Two TVs equipped with streaming services offer endless viewing options, while a convenient folding desk provides a cozy workspace for remote work or planning your next excursion. Lose yourself in a captivating read from our selection of adult books, or indulge in quality family time with our assortment of toys, books, and board games suitable for all ages.

For beach lovers, our downstairs storage unit is a treasure trove of essentials, including chairs, umbrellas, pop-up tents, beach toys, and a convenient cart to transport everything you need for a day of sun and surf. We also include 2 adult bikes and helmets for your enjoyment!

Conveniently located near the grocery stores and an array of restaurants and bars, our condo promises a memorable getaway filled with relaxation, adventure, and the joys of coastal living. We can't wait for you to experience it! Most places are accessible in less than a 5 minute drive.

Carolina Beach accesses are about 2 miles from the condo.

Linens and towels are included with this rental. This does not include beach towels so please plan accordingly. We provide a reasonable amount of essentials such as toilet paper, paper towels, soaps, and trash bags for your stay. If additional supplies are needed, guests will be responsible for replenishing them.

Please be aware that the unit above is another rental not owned or managed by us. As a result, you will experience some noise from above, particularly footsteps and movement on the stairs.

Guest access
- Anything in the condo except what is marked “not for rental use”
- Storage room
- Parking area under and around the house

Other things to note
Dogs may be permitted, pending host approval. Please advise of dogs attending. No other pets permitted due to owner allergies. A $200 pet fee is applied (prior to taxes and fees).

The apartment on the second floor, right above ours, is also a rental (not owned or managed by us): depending on the renters, there will be some noise at different hours.

listing_name: Stunning Oceanfront condo(612)
description:
Pet-friendly, Oceanfront condo with panoramic views on the first floor (one flight of stairs). Newly renovated kitchen cabinets & countertops (Nov 2025). Fully stocked kitchen with drip coffee maker, coffee, sugar & creamer. Sleeps 6 w/queen in main BR and full-over-full bunk bed w/ twin trundle in second BR. Large Deck with 2 high-top Polywood tables seating 4 and plenty of beach chairs. Full-size W/D and parking for 2 cars. 10-min walk to the boardwalk.

The space
Enjoy true oceanfront living in this beautifully decorated condo, featuring four separate beds for comfortable sleeping arrangements — perfect for families or small groups who prefer their own space.
Located just a short walk from the heart of the action, you’ll be minutes from the restaurants, shops, and activities along the Carolina Beach Boardwalk, while still enjoying the privacy and relaxation of a beachfront setting.
Outdoor Living
Relax on the private oceanfront deck, furnished with durable Polywood seating, including rocking chairs and 4 hightop chairs with tables— ideal for morning coffee, sunset dinners, or a glass of wine while listening to the waves.
Plenty of beach chairs are available for your use. The condo includes about four beach chairs labeled 1A, with additional chairs stored in the closet just inside the building’s entrance.
Enjoy unobstructed views of the ocean from the deck and living areas. The condo is located on the first floor, just one flight of stairs up — there is no elevator, but the elevated position ensures excellent ocean views while keeping access convenient.
Inside the Condo
Four separate beds for flexible sleeping arrangements
Fully equipped kitchen with all the supplies you’ll need for your stay, including pots, pans, utensils, and dishware
Drip coffee maker with ground coffee, sugar, and creamers to get you through your first days.
Smart TV with Sling Orange & Blue (includes many popular cable networks)
Wireless high-speed internet
Full-size washer and dryer in the unit
Comfortable coastal décor throughout
Pet-Friendly Policy
We welcome up to two dogs:
$100 fee for one dog
$125 fee for two dogs
For short stays or hypoallergenic breeds, fee adjustments may be considered upon request. Please inquire prior to booking.

Linens (sheets and towels) are available for $60 per stay.
If you prefer to bring your own, simply let me know after booking and a $60 credit will be applied to your reservation.

I only rent weekly in the months of June and July and the first 2 weeks in August. (Saturday to Saturday). Please keep that in mind when booking.

Guest access
There is a keypad on the front door

Other things to note
There are 2 parking spots located street side on the south side of the building. one behind the other. One spot is under the building and the other outside, directly behind it.

The washer door needs to be left open at all times. It is very humid here at the beach and can form mold very quickly. I have the cleaning lady wipe it down with bleach each cleaning, but it can grow quickly. There are stains, but they are permanent from past exposure

listing_name: Carolina Beach!  Close to boardwalk and beach!
description:
Cozy Carolina Beach retreat steps from the Boardwalk, with restaurants, and Britt’s Donuts.

By the lake, with a summer farmers market offering fresh produce and local artists.

The beach, marina, and Boardwalk are nearby.

Relax on sandy beaches, explore Carolina Beach State Park, or enjoy live music, festivals, and fireworks.

Kure Beach is close with a historic fishing pier.

Downtown Wilmington is 20 minutes away, with shops, dining, and riverfront charm.

The space
The unit features a comfortable living room that opens to a private balcony, perfect for morning coffee or evening breezes. A convenient laundry closet and free parking for one vehicle make your stay easy.

The kitchen has a counter bar for quick meals, and the bedroom offers a queen bed and Roku TV for streaming.

Outside, enjoy the swimming pool, picnic area, charcoal grill, and an outdoor shower for rinsing off after the beach.

Other things to note
It is a two story walk up.

It is not pet friendly.

description:
Welcome to Salty Air Retreat! 3 bed 2 bath 2nd floor beachfront condo just minutes from downtown Carolina Beach. Saturday to Saturday rentals Memorial weekend to Labor Day. Enjoy the huge deck that overlooks the ocean where you can periodically watch the dolphins as they fish our beautiful coast! Ample parking(2 spots and a garage) Well stocked kitchen will entice you to stay and eat in while you watch the waves! Fully equipped with linens and towels just bring your suits and relax!

The space
From Memorial weekend to Labor Day weekend we only accept Saturday to Saturday weekly rentals. Thank you!

Other things to note
We love animals... but not in the condo.

listing_name: Best location - The Beach House at Carolina Beach
description:
Our Ocean Front Beach House is one of the few single family Beach Houses on CB. Its location is great with the beach steps away and CB Lake Park across the street. Park your car and walk to many restaurants, downtown shops and the Boardwalk. The Beach in front of the house is always less crowded than other areas on the beach.
ABSOLUTELY NO PARTIES ALLOWED AT OUR BEACH HOUSE!! Our house is perfect for families or Couples.
Some Scenes from the movie “Nights in Rodanthe” were filmed on the porch.

The space
Our location is very unique and just far enough away from the busy boardwalk but yet only a 10 minute walk. Guest also appreciate the privacy of our home not being a duplex or a condo. We have nice covered porches on both the ocean and lake side always offering shaded, porch rocking chairs, water view and relaxation. Our home has 4 bedrooms with 2 full bathrooms. Every room has been recently updated. The eat in kitchen opens up to the living room.

Guest access
Guest like to use the space under the house for family games which almost always has a sea breeze and shade. In this area we have a nice enclosed outdoor shower and also a sun deck. Guest also have access to the spacious laundry room that has been recently updated.

Other things to note
Bed Sheets and Bath Towels are provided for each quest.

My husband and I would love to host your stay in our renovated bottom floor unit. Lower unit of duplex with one private entrance completely separated from the guests staying in the upper unit! Enjoy easy access to beach, lake and boardwalk with free parking on premises. Bring your family and friends for a lovely stay at Gone Coastal!

listing_name: The Beach House on Snapper
description:
THE BEACH HOUSE on SNAPPER is located on the beautiful, quiet end of the island! The House has 2 bikes to enjoy the family friendly streets, outdoor shower, beach towels, a cart with 2 beach chairs, and an EZ tent for shade/self tap umbrella! There’s a Guidebook on the Airbnb site for great restaurants nearby, coffee at beach. The Tiki Bar/Ocean Grill is a short walk along the beach for sunsets, evening cocktails, and eats out on the pier! So much to experience and explore, Come, be our guest!

The space
The entire house... The main floor is a wide open floor plan, with a beautiful kitchen island,...TV’s in the kitchen, the living room, and the upstairs bedroom! All TVs are smart TVs with all the Apps, if you have Netflix accounts, and/or Amazon Prime.
The Master bedroom is on the top floor, with a nice walk in shower… there is an air purifier in the master bedroom as well....The entry/bottom floor is the laundry room.

Guest access
Guests can access the entire house

Other things to note
The Beach House on Snapper lists accommodations for “4 guests.” One bed is a brand new sofa/pullout on the living room level...
The Internet is very strong for all guests, great for guests “who work from home”

listing_name: Charming beach cottage blocks from the beach!
description:
Recently remodeled!! Thanks for looking at my beach cottage!

The house is only 4 blocks to the ocean and located right behind the lake where you will find a sidewalk around the lake for easy beach access.

There is a farmers market around the lake every Saturday in the summer!

This is a great house in an excellent location perfect for families and those that want to bring their fur babies.

The backyard is large and fenced in. Fur babies are welcome with a one time $50 pet fee. No cats.

The space
The house is only 4 blocks to the ocean and located right behind the lake which is walking distance to the boardwalk and most restaurants and bars.

The house is across the street from an elementary school on a quiet residential road. You may hear some school traffic when school is in session but the majority of the time it is super quiet.

Enjoy the new greenway trail that goes from Mike Chappell park down to Kure beach! Great for running and biking or walking your dog.

Guest access
Easy front door access with key code check in.
All rooms are accessible. It is my personal residence so you will see some of my personal belongings throughout the house.

Other things to note
Please disclose if you are bringing your fur babies. There is an additional one time charge of $50 for your fur babies. Please include them in “guests” tab when booking to apply pet fee. No cats allowed due to allergies.

Please note: when booking during hurricane season (June-November) I do not offer any refunds or cancellations due to weather, unless there is a mandatory
evacuation in the area. Please refer to your travel insurance with any questions regarding policies due to storms.

I provide 4 Tommy bahama backpack beach chairs, beach wagon, umbrella and cooler for guests to use.

listing_name: Beachfront Vacation - Steps To The Ocean & Balcony
description:
Listen to the waves crash against the shore from the private covered balcony with a killer ocean view. Wake up to the soft colors of the sunrise as you sit on Adirondack chairs, with your freshly brewed cup of coffee, on the private balcony or from inside the living room. Watch the pelicans and seagulls skim the surface of the ocean, as the vibrant colors of the sunset reflect off its surface. Step outside & walk the private walkway right to the beach!

The space
Our recently renovated, fully furnished, spacious 2 bedroom beachfront condo on the second floor sleeps 6, with a comfy King size bed in the Master suite, Queen size bed in the second bedroom, and Queen size sleeper sofa in the living area which has a spectacular ocean view from the private beachfront balcony and everything you need to unplug and relax.

Enjoy two private covered balconies: ocean view and street view; 2 assigned parking spaces on-site; outdoor shower / rinse off area; central air conditioning and heating; ceiling fans in bedrooms and living room; additional box fans available; living room outfitted with flat screen 55 inch HD Smart TV, blu-ray player (BYO movies), and high speed internet to stream movies or connect to the outside world; fully equipped kitchen with granite counters and stainless steel appliances, including a refrigerator with ice maker, stove, oven, toaster oven, dishwasher, and microwave so you can make your favorite meals and drinks using the cookware, cooking utensils, dishes (service for 8), serving bowls, flatware, glasses, and wine glasses; wine bottle opener; Keurig coffee pot with K-cup coffee pods; coffee mugs; dish soap; scrub sponge; paper towels; large table & chairs (seats 6); private washer & dryer with laundry supplies (located in bathroom closet); closet with hangers in bedroom; bedroom furniture has plenty of drawer space; alarm clock; blankets / comforters; pillows; linens; two full bathrooms, one with a bathtub; body wash; shampoo; conditioner; hand soap; toilet paper; trash bags; recycling bin; towels; beach towels; as well as games and jigsaw puzzles for the times you’d like to stay in.

Guest access
The entire unit

Other things to note
A Vacation Rental Agreement is Required. Purchasing a separate trip insurance policy is strongly recommended should an unforeseen covered event arise.

description:
Sea the Lake - ocean view from the front and lake view from the back! Easy access to the ocean via public access 1/2 block on either side of the condo. Across the street there is a park with a fresh water lake and a greenway. The heart of town and boardwalk are a short walk away.

Sea the Lake is a cozy 1 bedroom condo with bunks in the hall. The kitchen has granite countertops and the living area is comfortably appointed. Enjoy sunrises over the ocean and sunsets over the lake!

The space
While Sea the Lake doesn't have expansive views of the sandy beach, you will see and hear the ocean from the front deck and if you're an early bird, you can catch some beautiful sunrises over the water. The back deck overlooks the community pool and Carolina Beach Lake, where you can see gorgeous sunsets on a daily basis.

You will find the comforts of home here and see a few photos of our family at the beach over the years.

All you need is you, your clothes, and personal toiletries (we have shampoo, conditioner, and body wash available for your use). listing_name: CAROLINA VIEWS (OCEAN + MARSH)
description:
OCEANFRONT AND MARSHFRONT. Updated. Open Concept. Breathtaking views of the ocean on the spacious front porch with spectacular views of the marsh from the back porch. Beautiful Community Pool. Truly a one-of-a-kind property for the price.

The space
Frequently Asked Questions

1. Is the property available
2. Where is the property located? What is nearby?
3. Information about the property and community
4. Do we allow pets?
5. Do we allow smoking?
6. What is your check-in policy? Do you offer early check-in?
7. What is your checkout policy? Do you offer late checkout?
8. Is the property oceanfront?
9. Does the property have easy access to the beach
10. Do you offer discounts for return guests?
11. Do you have age minimums for the property?
12. Do you have any recommendations for getting around?
13. What is the parking situation?
14. Do you have any recommendations for food or activities?
15. What is the grocery situation?
16. What is the linen situation?
17. What do I need to bring?
18. Do you have any beach supplies? Where are they located?
19. What kitchen supplies do I need to bring?
20. Do you offer dedicated golf cart parking?



1. Is the property available?

- Yes, the property is available if the dates are open on the calendar. Dates blocked off on the calendar are not available. To help prevent fraud, we ask guests to complete their profiles with pictures before booking their reservation.

2. Where is the property located? What is nearby?

- The property is at the popular North end of Carolina Beach. The address of the property is 1801 Canal Drive, Building A. The unit number will be provided 5 days before check-in. The property is a short 2-minute walk from the beach access and Freeman Park, a popular drive-on beach. A Tiki Bar on the pier is also a short 2-minute walk away with comfy bar food, spectacular ocean views, and unbelievable drink specials. The famous Carolina Beach Boardwalk is a short 5-minute cruise away. Downtown Wilmington and Wrightsville Beach are 25-30 minutes away, depending on traffic.

3. Information about the property and community

- The property is located in the Breakers community, one of the hottest condo developments in Carolina Beach because of both ocean and marsh views and proximity to Freeman Park. Built in the 1980s, the building is older, but most of the units have been fixed up (including ours), which adds to the class of the community. But again, the building is older. THERE IS NO ELEVATOR. The property is on the 3RD FLOOR. MUST BE ABLE TO WALK UP 2 FLIGHTS OF STAIRS (Approximately 20 steps). Trust me, the views are worth it.

- It is a lively but classy community. Mostly vacationers during the summer. Mostly residents during the off-season.

The parking lot below the property allows for easy parking of 2 cars.

4. Do you allow pets?

-- We love pets, but to ensure the highest quality property, we unfortunately have a strict no pet policy except for documented service animals. No exceptions will be made. This includes small pets, well-behaved pets, mature pets, hypoallergenic pets, etc.

5. Do we allow smoking?

- No smoking is allowed on the property, including the deck or outdoor areas. Any evidence of smoking on the property will again result in a $250 fee + damages and a poor review on Airbnb.

6. What is your check-in policy? Do you offer early check-in?

- We are proud to offer easy self-check-in starting at 3 p.m. Five days prior to your reservation, you will receive an Airbnb message with a check-in code (for a lockbox next to the front door), unit number, additional parking information, etc.

- We cannot offer early check-in during peak season (May to August); however, starting in 2025, guests may inquire about early check-in for a small fee during the off-season.

7. What is your checkout policy? Do you offer late checkout?

-Check-out is 11 am. Unfortunately, we are unable to offer late checkout at this time. Guests who check out late are subject to a $50 late checkout fee if they are still in the property >30 minutes after the checkout time. Otherwise, checkout is easy and laid out. Like most private rentals, we ask guests to take out the trash (dumpster in the community), clear the dishwasher, etc.

- For the 2025 season, guests will not be required to strip the linens.

All parking passes must be returned by 11 am. If the weather is gorgeous (which it usually is) and you are trying to get in a couple extra hours at the beach, there is a town parking lot across the street where you can park for $20 a day.

8. Is the property really oceanfront?

- Absolutely! Guests rave about the Ocean and Marsh views that define the property. However, since it is across the street, the pictures really do not do the views justice. I have been going to property for years, and I still can't get over the views. We do a ton of cooking at the property because it feels like the ocean is in your living room when you are in the kitchen.

9. Does the property have easy access to the beach?

- Absolutely, less than 2 minutes from the porch to the sand via two public beach access points. Guests will be provided a PDF 5 days prior to arrival that maps out the easiest way to access the beach. Guests share access to the beach with Freeman Park, which is a drive on beach. Traffic is incredibly slow-moving and, at times, incredibly entertaining as you watch certain vehicles that have no business driving on the beach get stuck in the sand.

10. Do you offer discounts for return guests?

- We love our return guests. If you have stayed with us previously, please let me know before booking, and we are happy to provide a discount as our way of saying thank you.

11. Do you have age minimums for the property?

- Due to legal liabilities, we ask that all guests staying at the property be over the age of 25 (excluding children). We leave it up to our guests to adhere to this policy and do not actively enforce age restrictions. Truthfully, we want guests who will respect and enjoy the property without drawing unnecessary attention to themselves. Any reports of underage drinking or unruly behavior of any kind are subject to immediate removal from the property without a refund. Like they told me my first week in college. Have fun, but not too much fun.

12. Do you have any recommendations for getting around?

- We recommend that guest bring their own vehicle or rent a car, preferably a Jeep, when on Carolina Beach. We provide two parking passes for each reservation. You will benefit from a car for dinner and non-beach activities during your stay. The beach and tiki bar are obviously very walkable. However, the boardwalk where the remainder of Carolina Beach is a quick 5–7 minute drive away. Uber and Lyft services on the island are limited, but I have not tried them recently.

13. How is the parking situation?

- We provide 2 parking passes with each reservation. Parking is available in the lot directly below the house. The only rule is DO NOT park in front of the garage, as these are reserved for lower-level units (compensation for inferior views).

- Overall, parking is surprisingly plentiful for an Oceanfront condo community. However, they will tow your vehicle if you do not put the parking pass in your car, especially during peak season.

- You will receive a PDF with a map 5 days prior to arrival that outlines where to park if you are more visual like me!

14. Do you have any recommendations for food or activities?

- Absolutely. We have a welcome book that provides a list of all our favorite places in the Carolina Beach area to visit upon your arrival. However, a couple of our favorite places to get you started include:

o Carolina Beach Pier Tiki Bar- beautiful pier and tiki bar. Walking distance. amazing views. Comfy bar food. Local favorite.
o Fat Pelican- coolest vibe, most eclectic bar I know
o Wake N Bake- the bacon and maple syrup glazed doughnuts are worth the calories
o Brunchies- great views of the harbor and delicious brunch food
o Kates Pancake House- my favorite breakfast joint
o Flaming Amy Burrito (FAB)- a local staple, our go-to cheap eat

- If you are Wilmington/Wrightsville area we also recommend:

o Indochine- where my wife and I had our first date. Excellent outdoor seating
o Blue Surf Café- best meatloaf sandwich ever, perhaps best sandwich ever
o Blue Water- best water views around

- Ultimately, there are not a lot of bad bites in Carolina Beach or Wilmington. However, be advised that restaurants can get very busy during peak season. We recommend either going early or calling ahead from May to August.

Also, if you happen to be looking for a good church while in town, we recommend Port City Church in Wilmington.

15. What is the grocery situation?

- There are two grocery stores on the island, Food Lion and Publix. Food Lion is a little older. The Publix was built in 2019 or 2020. We use both. Food Lion has good quality meat and, overall, lower prices. The Publix has the sandwiches for the beach and, overall, a better selection. There are also a couple of smaller places for fresh Seafood we recommend:

- Cape Fear Seafood company- great crab and seafood pots
- Blackburn Brothers Fresh Seafood- super high quality fresh off-the-dock seafood, but they do close early.

- We also really like the Veggie Wagon as well for premade meals and other local favorites.

16. What is the linen situation?

- Guests will receive hand towels, kitchen towels, queen bedding x 1, and several bath towels with each reservation.

- Guests are required to bring their own beach towels

- Starting for the 2025 season, for added convenience, guests are no longer asked to strip beds or place linen in the washer.


17. What do I need to bring?

- Other than your favorite adult beverages? As discussed above, we ask that guests bring their own beach towels. We also do not have an umbrella this season, as the sand, humidity, and Atlantic Ocean have destroyed the last several. So, if you are pigmently challenged and burn easily like me, I highly recommend bringing/buying your own umbrella or another shade device. There are many beach stores on the island where you can pick one up. Publix usually sells beach gear as well for added convenience. We also recommend Island Tackle and Hardware as they have shade devices and more (they take a lot of our money; we like them a lot). We were offering individually packaged bath soaps, shampoos, and conditioners with COVID, but we found most guests largely did not use them, so we donated these supplies to our local shelter. We try to keep community supplies of shampoo and conditioner on hand if you happen to forget. Dish soap and hand soap obviously are provided.

18. Do you have any beach supplies? Where are they located?

- While we do not offer an umbrella currently, we do have beach chairs, toys, and games in a storage unit at the back of the building (building A). A key is on the welcome board to access the storage unit upon arrival. To find the unit, walk behind building A, and you will see a path next to HVAC directly underneath our back porch. There will be a door with our unit number on it.

You will receive a PDF 5 days prior to arrival with instructions on how to access the storage unit.

19. What kitchen supplies do I need to bring?

- We hope relatively few. We take pride in offering a fully functional kitchen, including pots and pans, an array of seasoning, oil, kitchen utensils, and much more. Many of our guests have commented on how stocked the kitchen is compared to our competitors. The unit will also be stocked with a garbage bag in each trashcan, a recycling bag, 1 roll of paper towels, and 1 roll of toilet paper. These supplies are not intended to last the guests through their entire stay (especially for longer stays), so we ask that guests pick up these consumables when they stop at the grocery store.

20. Do you offer dedicated golf cart parking?

- While golf carts are not prohibited, we cannot offer separate golf cart parking. Any golf cart rental must be parked in a vehicle parking spot with one of the two provided parking passes. Extension cords cannot be run from the condo unit across the parking lot. Parking in front of the garage units is not allowed, as the first-floor units own these spots.

Guest access
Beautiful 1 bedroom 1 bath condo with oversize porch suited for entertaining. Spectacular views of both the marsh and ocean. Community access to the pool beach and Freeman park. Private access to storage unit with chairs and beach toys. Unlimited access to coffee, tea, creamers and sugar.

listing_name: Sound & Sea (7 bed/4 bath & Elevator)
description:
Escape to our 4-story townhome with 6 decks, offering breathtaking ocean and sound views. Steps from the beach and waterway, it's perfect for beach lovers and water enthusiasts! This condo features hardwood floors, carpeting, granite counters, and an elevator. With 7 beds and 4 baths, there's ample space for large groups. Enjoy stunning sunrises and sunsets on the accessible decks. Explore nearby restaurants, bars, and shops for endless entertainment.

The space
Escape to our beachside haven in Carolina Beach! Our charming retreat boasts 7 bedrooms and 4 bathrooms, offering plenty of space for your group. Step inside and feel the coastal vibes. Unwind in the shared backyard oasis or rinse off in the outdoor shower after a day of sun and surf. With the intracoastal waterway just steps away and the beach accessible through a nearby public access point, you'll be immersed in the beauty of the coast. Enjoy the abundance of natural light flowing through the multiple windows, showcasing the stunning views from our 6 balconies overlooking the ocean and sound. Embrace the beach lifestyle and create lasting memories in our tranquil and sun-soaked home. Your perfect seaside getaway awaits!
* guests to provide bedroom and bathroom linens *

Guest access
Guests will have exclusive access to the entire house throughout their stay. Check-in and check-out are facilitated through a convenient electronic keypad code. For added security, outdoor cameras are installed on the property.

Parking is available on-site and comfortably accommodates up to four cars. Please be mindful that parking more than three SUVs might be challenging due to space constraints. To avoid any inconvenience or potential towing, kindly refrain from parking on the road or in neighboring spaces.

To ensure fire safety, we regretfully do not provide a grill or fire pit on the premises. However, guests are more than welcome to bring their own grill to enjoy outdoor cooking. Additionally, there is a shared backyard available for guests to relax and unwind.

The use of the elevator is restricted to individuals weighing up to 250 lbs. It is essential that the elevator is solely utilized by those with a genuine need. Please note that guests will be held responsible for any repair costs resulting from misuse or damages that are not considered normal wear and tear, such as user-inflicted damage.

Other things to note
- Garbage removal on Monday mornings. Please place garbage at the end of the driveway Sunday night before to prevent overflow if your stay is impacted by either of those days. After removal, kindly put the bins behind the home
- Check-out time is strictly 10am. Late check-out incurs a $250 fee per hour, and if over 2 hours late, a full day/night will be charged. Cleaning company arrives promptly, and instructions will be provided.
- Wi-Fi connection may be slow or intermittent due to location.
- Guests are to provide their own bed linens and towels. Rental companies can provide linens prior to guest arrival for a fee based on bed usage. Some recommended options include Molly Maids Co., Coastal Linen Services, and Beach Linen Rentals. These companies offer clean and sanitized linens that can be delivered directly to your accommodation. Feel free to reach out to them for more information on pricing and availability. There are several bed linen rental companies conveniently located near Carolina Beach. Some recommended options include Molly Maids Co., Coastal Linen Services, and Beach Linen Rentals. These companies offer clean and sanitized linens that can be delivered directly to your accommodation. We ask that guests reach out to them for more information on pricing and availability to avoid any errors.

LAYOUT WITH BED SIZING:
- Floor 1 is simply a small entrance with elevator.
- Floor 2: Bedroom 1 - king bed, Bedroom 2 - bunk beds (queen bottom, twin top), Bedroom 3 - full bed and king bed
- Floor 3: Bedroom 4 - queen bed
- Floor 4: Bedroom 5 - king bed (Master), Bedroom 6 - full/double bed, Bedroom 7 - king bed
- Each room has balcony access

listing_name: Stay Salty Villa *Pool is Closed* Walk to Beach
description:
Just one block from the beach, this 2BR/2.5BA Carolina Beach condo offers canal views, private balcony, and a seasonal pool shared between 4 units *CLOSED*! Enjoy a full kitchen, private en suite bathrooms with both bedrooms, and cozy coastal charm. A 15-min walk or short drive brings you to Britt’s Donuts, The Fat Pelican, Island Burgers, and The Summer I Turned Pretty filming spots. Perfect for beach getaways, couples, or friends looking to explore all that CB has to offer! NO PETS ALLOWED!

The space
Welcome to Stay Salty Villa—a bright, stylish second-floor condo offering the perfect blend of comfort, convenience, and coastal charm just one block from the beach. This 2-bedroom, 2.5-bathroom retreat is thoughtfully designed for relaxation, whether you're planning a romantic escape, a girls’ weekend, or a fun-filled beach getaway.

The entire unit is located on one spacious level, perched above the covered parking area below. As you step inside, you’ll be greeted by an open-concept layout filled with natural light and tranquil canal views. The living area features comfortable seating, a smart TV with streaming capabilities, and direct access to your private balcony—ideal for sipping coffee or evening wine.

The fully equipped kitchen includes granite countertops, stainless steel appliances, a full-size fridge, dishwasher, microwave, coffee maker, toaster, and all the cookware, utensils, and dinnerware you’ll need for home-cooked meals or takeout feasts. A nearby half bath adds extra convenience for guests.

Both bedrooms are generously sized and include private ensuite bathrooms and walk-in closets. The primary suite features a queen bed, soaking tub, walk-in shower and lots of natural light. The second bedroom has a king bed and its own full bath with a walk in shower—making this a great setup for couples or friends traveling together.

Additional amenities include in-unit laundry, high-speed Wi-Fi, central AC and heat, ceiling fans, and thoughtful touches like board games and beach chairs. Guests also enjoy access to a seasonal pool *CLOSED FOR SEASON* shared between just four units, offering a peaceful space to cool off after a day in the sun.

With private parking directly beneath the unit and everything on one level upstairs, Stay Salty Villa is both stylish and functional—your ideal home base in beautiful Carolina Beach.

Guest access
Guest have access to the entire house.

Other things to note
Parking is directly under the unit. Oversized vehicles will not fit. Space for two cars to park one in front of the other.

listing_name: Eastbound Historic Beach Cottage
description:
Eastbound is a 1940's beach cottage that has been lovingly restored to preserve the charm of a nostalgic beach house but with modern comforts such as new HVAC, new bathroom, full kitchen and outdoor shower. Conveniently located 50 steps from the beach and across the street from Tony Silvagni's surf school and beach equipment rental shop. No need to get in your car once you arrive.
The house is pet friendly and there is a $75 pet fee. Alert us when booking if you plan to bring a pet.

The space
The historic beach cottage has original bead board walls and hardwood floors all carefully restored. The common areas are spacious and comfortable. The front porch has comfy chairs and a table for dining and enjoying the ocean breezes.

Comforters and pillows are provided but we do not provide sheets or towels and this is reflected in the rate. Most people bring their own or Seaside Linens can rent linens and we are happy to assist in any way.

The house sleeps 6 in well appointed bedrooms complete with 2 new queen mattresses and a bunk bed room for the kids.

There is wifi in the home and tv has a Roku device so you can access your Netflix, Amazon and Hulu etc. channels.

The kitchen is fully equipped with a full sized refrigerator, oven and microwave for cooking meals at home.

Friendly pets are welcome however there is a $75 pet fee.

Parking for up to 3 cars is not an issue as long as your vehicle is not oversized and can fit down a narrow driveway.

Guest access
Guests have full access to the home and yard.

Other things to note
Starting in 2020 we are not providing sheets or towels. Additionally we are taking all CDC recommended cleaning and disinfecting steps between guests. Seaside Linens can rent linens and we are happy to assist in any way.

The house is dog friendly for a $75 fee. Please let us know if you intend to bring a dog.

listing_name: Luxury condo w EV charger, pool, sound view - C201
description:
Luxury Carolina Bay condo beautifully decorated with ocean and canal views on the second level - furnished and equipped with everything you need to enjoy your stay, including an EV charger! (ChargePoint Home Flex Electric Vehicle (EV) Charger up to 50 Amp, 240V, Level 2 Wi-Fi Enabled EVSE, UL Listed, Energy Star, NEMA 6-50 Plug or Hardwired, Indoor/Outdoor, 23-Foot Cable. Tesla owners should bring their own adapter.)

The space
Luxury Carolina Bay condo beautifully decorated with ocean and canal views on the second level - furnished and equipped with everything you need to enjoy your stay, including an EV charger! (ChargePoint Home Flex Electric Vehicle (EV) Charger up to 50 Amp, 240V, Level 2 Wi-Fi Enabled EVSE, UL Listed, Energy Star, NEMA 6-50 Plug or Hardwired, Indoor/Outdoor, 23-Foot Cable. Tesla owners should bring their own adapter.)

The fantastic kitchen and dining room is fully equipped with everything you need for family meals. The deck off the living area offers views of the canal and pool. The private primary suite with King bed is located on the second floor and has a private deck with canal and ocean views. The second bedroom has a King sized bed, while the third bedroom offers a Full bed and a Twin bunk bed. Immaculately landscaped grounds lead to the dock and marina. Extras include a gas grill, bikes, beach chairs and beach cart all right there in the garage for guests to utilize. All reservations include six wristbands for the pool and two parking passes.

Located along the west side of the canal in Carolina Beach, Carolina Bay is a waterfront condominium community with a pool, picnic grounds, clubhouse, boat slips and marina. Carolina Bay is only about a ten minute walk to beach access and the beautiful Atlantic Ocean.

Carolina Bay is just a short distance to all local entertainment and shopping amenities. Pleasure Island is a barrier island made up of Carolina Beach, Kure Beach and historic Ft. Fisher. The unobstructed beaches are perfect for walking, fishing and collecting seashells. The favorable temperatures in May through September are ideal for swimming, surfing or just playing in the waves. Carolina Beach has been a favorite for vacationers for the past century as it is perfect for families looking to enjoy time together in a friendly environment. The island offers many attractions both natural and commercial. There is a variety of dining from casual to more upscale menus with fresh seafood specials daily. Our charter boats located at the harbor in the heart of Carolina Beach offer charter fishing (in-shore and deep-sea). The North Carolina Aquarium and Fort Fisher History Museum and historic site are just down the road at the south end of the island. In the same area you will find the Ft. Fisher to Southport ferry. It is really fun to take a ride on the ferry for a day trip to historic Southport for some antiquing and lunch on the river. The Carolina Beach State Park located on the west side of the island offers miles of beautiful natural hiking trails, kayaking and fishing. You can even rent a pontoon boat and spend a day on the water visiting islands and marshes.

During summer season there are rides at the boardwalk for the kids as well as Thursday night fireworks with live entertainment. At the Carolina Beach Lake (which is the closest fresh water lake to the ocean on the eastern seaboard) there is a free outdoor family movie on Sunday evening and an awesome Farmers Market on Saturday mornings. Come for the holidays and enjoy the Island Of Lights! The lake and the boardwalk are decorated with lights and Christmas surprises with all kinds of entertainment for the kids. It s a year round fun place to visit so come see us soon.

*Please keep in mind that if you are renting a property with a pool during the off-season, it may not be open or available. Pools are usually open from mid- May to September, but dates can vary based on weather, permits, HOA guidelines, inspections, improvements, and unforeseen events. For more detailed information on specific pools, please feel free to contact our office.

Other things to note
• Welcome to Bryant Real Estate!
Established in 1952, we’re a locally licensed North Carolina team proudly trusted by property owners to manage this rental home.

• Who We Rent To
Our homes are rented to responsible adults 25 and older, as well as family groups. The person who books must be at least 25 and stay at the property for the entire reservation.

• After You Book
Keep an eye on the email address provided once your booking is confirmed! You’ll receive a message titled “Bryant Real Estate Rental Agreement.” Sometimes it lands in Promotions or Marketing folders, depending on your email settings. This email includes important steps to complete your reservation.

• Travel Insurance
We recommend purchasing Trip Preserver travel insurance from Red Sky – so you can plan for the unexpected. Whether it's an illness, a weather event, lost baggage, or canceled flights that prevent travel or interrupt your vacation, Trip Preserver covers a wide range of events to help keep your vacation dreams alive. The travel insurance cost and option will be on your emailed rental agreement.

• Cancellation Policy
o Full refund if you cancel within 24 hours of booking.
o Cancel 31+ days before arrival: full refund minus a $350 fee.
o Cancel 15–30 days before arrival: 50% refund minus a $350 fee.
o Cancel within 15 days of arrival: no refund.
If we’re able to re rent the property, an additional refund may apply (excluding non refundable fees and travel insurance).

• Pet Policy
Dogs are welcome! You can bring up to two dogs with a non refundable fee of $250 + tax per pet. If you don’t add this at checkout, we’ll add it to your reservation afterward.

• Pool Availability
If your rental includes a pool and your stay, please note that it may not be open. Pools typically operate from mid May through September, but exact dates can vary depending on weather, inspections, HOA rules, maintenance, and other factors.

• What We Provide (and What to Pack!)
We’ve got your bed linens and bath towels covered. However, we don’t supply toiletries, soaps, paper products, trash bags, or similar items— aside from a few starter essentials. Please plan to bring anything you’ll need beyond that.

• Check-In Details
For this home, you will need to stop by our office to pick up keys or any additional items you’ll need for your stay.

listing_name: Spectacular Views! - Beach Front Condo!
description:
Step out on the deck to take in the view! This oceanfront 2nd flr 1 bdrm condo located in a quiet part of Carolina Beach.You will be right on the beach, both the bedroom and living room are ocean facing. Furnished with all the comforts, so just kick back, relax & enjoy being right on the beach. The living room offers a sofa bed TV w/cable & wifi so you can work or relax. Don't miss the sunrise on the large deck chairs, & a perfect place to watch the evening with a glass of wine. Watch the.......

The space
As you enter our cozy little condo - your eyes will be drawn to the view of the ocean accessed by the big glass slider! We've tried to decorate to promote the feeling of calm and relaxation. There's a new and comfortable sofa (queen size sofa sleeper w/new memory foam mattress). The Smart TV is wall mounted and a complete sound system for your enjoyment. Internet access and cable TV is available.
The beautiful updated and fully equipped Kitchen overlooks the living room and incredible view of the ocean. Next to that is the hallway with a full bath with new walk-in tiled shower and a laundry area with washer/dryer.
The bedroom boasts 2 windows overlooking the beach and the nearby fishing pier, comes with a queen size bed, dresser, night-stand, TV and walk in closet.
All in all - it's a perfect little spot for a Romantic Weekend, work away location or Girls Getaway to relax, reflect and refresh!

Guest access
Guests have access to the full condo and also a small garage on the parking level to store beach gear, small boat or water toys, there is a Weber-type bbq available for use (rules and instructions are posted). There should be ample shared parking in the parking lot and there is additional parking across the street. The pool is available with access code and it's just a short walk across the street.

listing_name: Ocean View Condo | Walk to Tiki Bar & Beach
description:
Amazing ocean view condo! Located in the heart of Carolina Beach and just few steps away from the beach access and Tiki Bar! Perfect location with access to beach, restaurants and bars. Private 3rd story balcony and pool.

Other things to note
Peak Season & Discounts:
Peak season runs May through August. During this time, weekly and monthly discounted rates are not available unless a specific promotion is noted.

Our property is situated along the coastline, and occasionally, inclement weather can have an impact. Please be aware that we do not provide refunds for adverse weather conditions. It is worth noting that hurricane season spans from June 1st to November 30th, so please keep this in mind when making your reservation.

The unit is on the 3rd floor and there is no elevator.

listing_name: Modern Beach Home – Walk to Ocean + Golf Cart!
description:
Beautiful 3BR/3.5BA townhome just 2 blocks from the beach—with a new sidewalk starting 50 yards from the home for a safe, easy walk! Sleeps 8 with king, queen, and four twin beds—all with ensuite baths and TVs. Includes WiFi, full kitchen, gas grill, washer/dryer, sheets and towels provided, outdoor shower, and parking for 4 cars. 4 adult bikes, 2 kids bikes, kayaks included. Golf cart available to rent. Pet-free, smoke-free, and professionally cleaned.

The space
Location Highlights:
Sidewalk starts ~50 yards from the home and leads directly to the beach—just 2 short blocks away!

Convenient beach access nearby

Walk, bike, or take the golf cart to Ocean Grill & Tiki Bar, Boardwalk, shops, and dining

Short drive to downtown Wilmington for more restaurants and nightlife

Use the Pleasure Island App for events and activities during your stay

Extras Included:
Sheets and towels provided

4 adult bikes & 2 kids bikes for exploring

2 kayaks with paddles and life vests

Golf cart available for rent – $50/day or $350/week
(Charging station in garage. Waiver, license, and insurance required.)

Guest access
Guests have full access to the entire home, including all living spaces, bedrooms, bathrooms, laundry, and outdoor shower.

Other things to note
Carolina Beach is celebrating its 100th anniversary this year with special events, live music, and family-friendly festivals happening all summer long. Just search “Pleasure Island NC events” online to see the full calendar and make the most of your visit!

description:

Carolina Beach, NC

The space
Each of our bedrooms have a bathroom. The first floor bedroom has a double bed and bunk beds. The second floor bedroom is the smallest and would share the bathroom with the living area. Upstairs there are two bedrooms the back room has a queen sized bed and the front bedroom is the master with a king sized bed. There is a deck/sitting area off the master bedroom.

Other things to note
NO pets and NO smoking
minimum age for booking is 25

description:
Come soak up the sun in this fully remodeled, beautifully styled beach condo. Flamingo Reef offers 3 bedrooms and 2 full baths with spacious open concept living areas. It is located in a quiet family oriented building just steps from the ocean! Flamingo Reef also offers a pool to relax by or splash around in! You will find all the comforts of home while staying at Flamingo Reef. Enjoy relaxing outdoors and dining with a view on the two wonderful covered balconies. Come and stay a while!

The space
Flamingo Reef is fully renovated and beautiful! You will find all the comforts of home as you stay just steps from the beach. Enjoy dinning on the large balcony with the ocean just across the street, or a cup of coffee on the balcony off of the master bedroom.

Guest access
