listing_name: NEW Carolina Beach Home for Perfect Family Getaway
description:
FAMILY GETAWAY! Clark's Catch is a beautiful, newly renovated (2026), 3-bedroom/3-bathroom duplex/condo located within walking distance to the ocean. This home features new screened/covered porches, washer/dryer, HVAC, and linens (included). It's the perfect home for a family getaway. We are close to the boardwalk, Tiki Bar, seasonal outdoor market, greenway, aquarium, ferry, and restaurants. We are sure there is something for your family to enjoy! (*No pets or service animals - no exceptions*)

The space
First Floor Features:

- Open floor plan with living room, dining room and kitchen.

- Dining room table seats four with additional seating for four at the kitchen bar.

- Fully stocked kitchen (pots, pans, coffee maker, toaster, blender, plates, utensils, serving dishes and other basic essentials).

- TV in the living room with media player

- Enjoy the ocean breeze off the living room deck (table & chairs)

- Full bath (tub/shower)

- Washer and Dryer (new 2024)

- Dishwasher (new 2023)

- Bedroom with Queen bed, TV & ceiling fan


Second Floor Features:

- Primary bedroom with full private bath (tub/shower) and patio doors that open to a private deck. Private workspace included for Primary Bedroom (table and chairs).

- Queen bed, TV, & ceiling fan

- Second bedroom has bunk beds (both beds are Full Size), TV & recessed ceiling fan

- Full bath on the second floor near bunk bedroom (tub/shower)

Outside the Duplex:

- Access to a private, heated, outdoor shower and ample parking under carport and driveway.

- Security Disclaimer: Surveillance cameras (exterior only in carport) are on property 24/7 that overlook the driveway and carport. The cameras are to ensure security of the perimeter to keep our home safe while no one is there and protect your property while onsite. All cameras are motion detection enabled and trigger upon movement.

- Propane and Charcoal grills are available for use.

- Duplex is located on a quiet cul-de-sac, which is a great place for kids to enjoy being outside.

- Beach Access is just 4 blocks/ 5 min walk/0.3 miles down the street and an easy walk (even with kids). Full use of the beach wagon as well if you need another set of hands.

- Tennessee Public Beach Access is one of the best on the island. Beach access, metered parking, access ramp and best of all, Lifeguard stand #6 (manned all Summer)!

- To keep the home well maintained we politely require: No Smoking or Vaping on the property, No Pets, No Service Animals (we have a severe medical allergy in our family and are exempt from housing service animals), and last but not least...No large parties or events.

- Must be 28 or older to rent and as per AirBnB requirements, the renter must be present during the entire rental period. So sorry, but no, your mom/dad/etc can not book it for you and your friends (all under 28) unless she/he/they will be there the entire time.

**Please feel free to reach out with any additional questions though!

Guest access
You will have access to the Unit and it's driveway. This is a duplex and the adjoining Unit is our private residence.

Other things to note
Beach Wagon, if available, is located in the car port area to help you carry items back and forth to the beach. Please see the House Manual for instructions for use and the lock combination.

listing_name: Relax in a HGTV Beachfront pick!
description:
Recently featured on HGTV's Beachfront Bargain Hunt, this picturesque cottage is located just steps from the beach and minutes to the boardwalk. With a large porch to hear the waves crash, one can enjoy a morning beverage with the sunrise and an evening cocktail at sunset. Impeccably maintained and stylishly updated, this cottage offers an easy way to relax. BBQ at home, play games in the spacious back yard, read books, walk along the white coast, or head out to the boardwalk for island fun!

The space
One of the most distinctive attributes this cottage offers is its location on Pleasure Island. In a neighborhood of mostly single-family homes, our guests have access to one of the most serene areas of beach on this island. Families can enjoy the openness and less crowded space to play, swim, and relax. Our beach access is handicap accessible and on a wide, white beach with a lifeguard stand directly at our entrance. Close enough to the boardwalk that you can enjoy the summer Thursday night fireworks from a beach chair right here!!

Our kitchen space supplies the following: pots, pans, dishware, silverware, and drinkware. A coffeemaker, tea kettle, toaster, blender, and bar ware provide our guests with most modern day conveniences.
We stock some household products and paper supplies to get our guests started with their vacation. Access to vacuum, broom, bath/kitchen cleaner and dish soap.

The master bedroom has a queen bed with luxury linens, a smart tv, fan/light combo, dresser drawers, and closet (with extra blanket).

The second bedroom has a full bed with twin bunk (designer linens supplied), smart tv, fan, dresser drawers, and closet (with extra blankets).

Our cozy living area offers plenty of seating to relax and a sofa bed for guests (linens supplied). A smart tv and fan/light combo. Guests can enjoy an array of family games and puzzles.

The large porch provides seating to dine and to relax while enjoying our Carolina Beach breeze. An option to close the gate at the top of the stairs lets the parents relax a bit as well. And because we want families to spend more time enjoying their vacation and less time stressing, we offer those with young children many of the necessities for travel - pack n play, high chair, bed rail for toddlers, beach toys etc. at no cost (simply request).

The private parking area has room for 3 cars. Under the carport, you can unwind after a day soaking in the sun and savor in a private outdoor shower (hot/cold water) with changing space. A laundry room with washer/dryer is conveniently located next to the outdoor shower to toss in those sandy beach clothes.

After a sun filled day at the beach you can BBQ at home on the gas grill and play corn hole, badminton, and volleyball in the large back yard watching the sunset over the intracoastal waterway.

Conveniences include: pillows, blankets, luxury bedding and sheets. Both bath towels and beach towels for the maximum capacity of guests. Beach Chairs, Umbrella, and Caddy are available for guests.

*****PLEASE READ*****

10pm outside \quiet\" hours to respect our year-round neighbors

This home is non-smoking both inside and on the deck.

We love all animals but due to family allergies

listing_name: Light-filled/Beach-Ocean views/Top floor condo
description:
Top Floor Bright Airy condo. No carpet. Perched ocean, beach/park views front patio, marsh back balcony, surfer’s paradise, wave sounds, cotton bed linens, bath towels. Beach chairs. Stocked kitchen. Self check-in. North island privacy by entrance to Freeman Park/across Carolina Beach Pier&Tiki/1.5 mi bike/drive/walk to center of town. Steps to ocean, pool set in marsh, grilling stations/picnic tables. Washer/dryer. King bed+sofa bed. Peace. 4 guests max. No smoking. No pets. Come relax!

The space
Bright & airy Top floor of a 4 story Oceanside building. Views galore. Renovated kitchen, bathroom and flooring. Everything is either new or refreshed with a minimalist modern coastal decor and feel like home surrounding. As Raleigh residents, we wanted a fresh approach to seaside living the way we enjoy it. Truly a happy and peaceful space. No neighbors above. Bright white kitchen w/granite and bathroom with a 32” marble vanity, tiled walk-in shower and for convenience a double built-in medicine cabinet for all your toiletries. TVs in living room and bedroom. Fully stocked kitchen including pots/pans/variety of spices and space in the pantry for your food. Cotton bed linens and bath towels. Turnkey stay- All you need to bring is your food, toiletries and drink! Wonderful pool alongside the marsh- stunning sunsets. NO ELEVATOR. As owners, we consistently update and change out furnishings. You are steps from Freeman Park with its almost 2 miles of undeveloped beach or for you to take your 4-wheel drive. Pier Tiki Bar & Restaurant across the alley (and from the beach) and let's not forget the constant sounds of the crashing waves.

Guest access
Entire Condo
Self check-in
Exterior covered entrance
Parking in front of building

3pm check-in
10am check-out

Other things to note
Beach Recreation at your fingertips as we are at the entrance to Freeman Park. Great restaurants on the island, including the Carolina Beach Pier and Tiki restaurant & bar a few steps away. A couple of live music venues. Two major grocery stores on the island. Ft. Fisher Aquarium. Carolina Beach State Park. Greenway system to ride your bikes.
Unit is turn-key for your stay excepting food, drinks and toiletries.

Carolina Beach’s North End is the laid-back part of the island, where the ocean sparkles and the pace slows just enough to savor the moment. It’s the quieter side of town, offering easy access to dunes, nature walks, and the marina, with plenty of small beaches and scenic viewpoints. While the iconic Boardwalk belongs to the central action, the North End nearby Freeman Park and quieter coves make it ideal for family days, shelling, and sunset strolls. Whether you’re chasing a peaceful beach day or a breezy coastal escape, the North End of Carolina Beach delivers sandy serenity with a touch of local charm.

Must be 25 years of age.
No pets allowed. There is a $975 fee assessed if an animal is brought into the condo.
Photo ID required
Parking/towing rules enforced so you must keep your parking pass on your dash or hanging from rear-view mirror.

listing_name: New Hot Tub, Surf Studio, Easy Walk to Beach!
description:
Welcome to Studio By The Sea!
• Private Studio in Carolina Beach
• Easy walk to the beach! 0.3 miles to the closest public beach access
• Beautiful Outdoor Space: Private Hot Tub, Sectional Couch, Roku TV, Propane Fire Pit & Ring Toss!
• Fenced-in backyard with an Outdoor Shower

The space
Welcome to Studio By The Sea! This private studio in Carolina Beach offers a cozy retreat just a short 0.3-mile (approximately a 5-minute) walk from the nearest public beach access. Unwind after a day at the beach in your own private hot tub, adding a touch of luxury to your stay. Whether you're seeking a serene solo retreat or a romantic getaway, Studio By The Sea provides a comfortable and convenient base for your Carolina Beach experience.

Guest access
• Parking available for 2 cars in front of the home.
• Entry through front door with keyless PIN code lock that is specific to you
• Please park only on the right side of the driveway and pull all the way up towards the patio entrance. Studio By The Sea is on the lower level of the duplex, and the upper apartment is assigned the left side of the driveway.
• A maximum of two cars may park on the property. Also please note that the Town of Carolina Beach does not allow street parking.

Other things to note
• Private King Bed Studio in Carolina Beach
• Easy walk to the beach! 0.3 miles to the closest public beach access
• Beautiful Outdoor Space: Private Hot Tub, Sectional Couch, Roku TV, Propane Fire Pit & Ring Toss!
• Full kitchen with all essential amenities
• 2 Complimentary Beach Chairs
• High-speed WiFi & Smart Roku TV’s
• Pack ‘n’ play and high chair available if desired.
• Parking available for 2 cars in front of the home.
• We supply bed linens & bath towels. Beach towels NOT provided.
• We also provide enough hand soap, dish soap, toilet paper, paper towels, & trash bags to get you started upon arrival. However, if you are staying longer than a couple nights, please plan to supplement with your own supplies based on your personal needs.

Hot Tub Policy:
• Pets are NOT allowed in the hot tub
• You are using the hot tub at your own risk
• Pregnant women, persons with heart disease, diabetes or high blood pressure problems and elderly people should not use a hot tub or spa without a doctor’s permission.
• We do not advise young children to use the hot tub. In the event that you allow a minor to use the hot tub, they must be supervised at all times.
• Limit time in the hot tub or spa to no more than 30 minutes.
• No glass products in or around the hot tub.

Pet Fee:
• Please message us for pet approval prior to booking.
• Pets MUST be added to your reservation during the booking process. Once added, the $150 pet fee is included as part of the nightly rate (spread out equally over the course of the stay) and in the total price at checkout.
• Pet fee is non-refundable and is a flat rate for the stay.
• Limit is 2 dogs; no other animals permitted.
• Must pick up all droppings from pet(s).
• Dogs must be fully housebroken.
• Dogs are not permitted on furniture or linens.

House Rules:
• NO SMOKING. If anything is smoked inside, you will incur a $200 fee for deodorization treatment.
• Check-in time is 4:00PM and check out by 10:00AM. Early check ins and late check outs are not available due to our cleaning schedules. Unapproved late check outs may result in a $200 fee.
• No parking on premises before check in time or after check out time.
• Self check-in with keyless PIN code lock
• In order to avoid potential staining, please do NOT use bleach to clean anything during your stay. We have professional cleaners who will use bleach appropriately in between guests to ensure a high standard of cleanliness.
• Only stainless steel cleaners may be used on stainless steel appliances. Other cleaners will cause stainless steel to rust, so please do not use them on the appliances.
• Visitors must be approved by the host.
• Be respectful of our neighbors. Keep noise volume low and no walking through neighbors yards.
• Do not burn incense, essential oils, or similar items. These scents are difficult to remove before the next guest checks in, and some guests may have sensitivity to smells.
• Guest must sign a rental agreement.

listing_name: The Sweet Spot II
description:
Luxury Coastal Retreat!

Indulge in a luxurious beach getaway at this fully renovated and professionally decorated 1-bedroom, 1.5-bath condo, just one block from the ocean. Enjoy breathtaking ocean views from the private balcony, elegant interiors, and premium amenities.

✨ What You’ll Love:
• Stylish, fully stocked kitchen with quartz countertops & stainless steel appliances
• Fresh linens, beach towels, and complimentary coffee
• High-speed WiFi & Roku TV
• In-unit laundry

The space
Visit Carolina Beach in comfort and style in this professionally decorated, updated condo with ocean, marsh and pool views. The brand new kitchen features quartz countertops, stainless appliances, toaster, coffee maker, microwave and everything you need to prepare a meal. Beach chairs and sand toys are available for your use.

Guest access
You will have full access to the entire unit: one bedroom, a queen futon couch in the living room, 1.5 bathrooms, washer and dryer, updated kitchen, updated bathroom, a private deck with ocean and pool views and access to all our community has to offer!

Other things to note
We are committed to keeping our space clean and you healthy. We sanitize high-touch surfaces, down to the doorknob. We use cleaners and disinfectants approved by global health agencies, and we clean each room using extensive cleaning checklists.

We provide extra cleaning supplies, so you can clean as you stay. We are in compliance with local laws, including any additional safety or cleaning guidelines.

listing_name: The Great Wave
description:
Welcome to The Great Wave! This beautifully updated, 2 bed/2 bath 4th level condo (no elevator) has stunning ocean AND marina views and comes fully equipped with all of your basic essentials for a great vacation. Carolina Beach has activities for everyone, no matter the time of year, and this condo is located just a few feet away from it all! Includes two parking spots, seasonal pool, convenient beach access, and much more!

The space
This modern 2 bedroom, 2 bath OCEAN AND MARINA VIEW CONDO lets you completely embrace the magic of this growing beach town with its ocean view from the deck, living room, front porch, master bedroom and kitchen! It's in an unique spot on the island, perfectly positioned for guests to take full advantage of the beautiful Atlantic, as well as watch the boats at the canal, and check out the entertainment at the Boardwalk. The spacious deck is a great place to watch the sunrise and relax, or walk just a few steps to the beach or pool.

The kitchen contains newly upgraded cabinets & flooring, quartz counters, stainless steel appliances, vanities, toilets & sinks. The cabinets come fully stocked with plenty of cook, eat, and drink ware for your stay. There might be a few rolls of toilet paper, paper towels, and trash bags left behind to get you started, but you’ll want to bring some additional. There is a Keurig coffee machine, toaster, microwave, spice rack, and various utensils. The dining area has plenty of room for your family to gather around the table and enjoy a nice meal or play a game. The living room comes equipped with a comfortable sofa and a big screen TV with cable.

The master bedroom has a big, comfy king sized bed and private balcony access. However, the shower in the master is very small- probably 2ft by 2ft. The guest bedroom has a queen size bed and a TV. There is a full bath with a regular sized bath/shower.

Linens are provided for all beds (except for sofa) and will be freshly made up when you arrive, and a towel and washcloth will be set out for each guest.

Additional amenities include a washer and dryer in the unit for your convenience, WiFi and cable, and 2 marked parking spaces located directly below the unit. Please note- there is not an elevator in this building.

There are lots of fun things to do in Carolina Beach with attractions focused on families, couples, and fun! A ton of restaurants are within walking distance of the condo, and the famous Boardwalk is just a short walk along the beach!

* For the safety of our guests and our property, we like to fully disclose that there is a Ring doorbell cam installed on our front door that faces outside. There are no cameras in the house.

Guest access
The entire condo is yours! The code is in the welcome message. To lock the condo, shut the door, press the button at the bottom center of the keypad.

Other things to note
The building does not have an elevator so be prepared to climb stairs.

There is an awesome restaurant/bar nearby that has live music- especially during the warmer months. The live music is slightly audible while in the bedroom and can sometimes continue late at night. In the off season it’s not an issue. A sound machine is provided for light sleepers.

listing_name: Perfect location, close to the beach and boardwalk
description:
This well appointed one story townhouse is in the perfect location! If you're looking to get your toes in the sand, the beach is a short 4 minute walk! Or if your in CB for the fun of restaurants, bars, arcade and the boardwalk, it's also just a block and a half away. And if you just want some quiet time to yourself the private courtyard is perfect.

The space
This is my personal home that I rent when I am out of town. I clear all of my personal items out so there is plenty of space for you to make it feel like your home! It is furnished with cozy furniture, nice decor and has a very well appointed kitchen (I love to cook and bake). The bathroom has double sinks and a wonderful deep soaking tub!! There are two bedrooms. One has a queen bed and the other a king that converts to two x long twin beds. It is set as a king; there is a $25 charge to have it set up as twins.

The outdoor space is wonderful with a comfy sofa on the covered patio, sun loungers, bean bag chairs and a hammock chair. There is plenty sun but also a moveable umbrella if you want some shade. One thing I love is that there are no stairs!!! Step out of your car and in a few steps you're in the door. Coming back from a long day at the beach? Open the gate, set your chairs down, rinse off in the outdoor shower and step inside! No lugging all your luggage or beach stuff up endless stairs like most places at the beach. My courtyard feels so private and quiet but it's just a block away from all the action CB has to offer. Many people park their car when they arrive and don't get back in until it's time to head home.

Pets: we do allow pets. There is a $10/day/pet fee. Please make note of any pets that will be traveling with you. If you fail to disclose a pet you will be fined $25/day/pet.

Guest access
The entire apartment and courtyard are yours exclusively. It is part of a three unit building.

Other things to note
The pet fee is $15/dog. Airbnb does not have this as an automatic charge. Please state how many pets you have, it will bill for one.. I will send a payment request for the additional pets.

This unit is in-between two other units that are also rented on Airbnb. They can be rented together if you have a larger group. The other unit has access to the a pool. This one would to if rented in conjunction with the other unit. Because it is connected to the other units I do ask that guest be respectful regarding noise/music/tv volume/etc to insure other guest are not bothered.

If you would like us to separate the kind bed to make two twins we can for a $25 fee. Please let us know as far in advance as possible. Thanks.

description:
Hall Hacienda is a welcoming 2 level townhome with 1800 sqft. There are 4 bedrooms and 3 full baths with an open floor plan. Downstairs features a large family room w/ 60' TV, cable and wireless internet. There is a stocked kitchen. There is a washer/dryer combo. On main floor is bath and queen bedroom. Upstairs is a large master w/deck.The bath has a shower and soak tub. Upstairs are one w/queen bedroom and one w/twin and trundle. They share a bathroom. Parking for 4 cars and outdoor shower.

The space
Beach access is at the end of the block. (You might find another 'private' one a bit closer if you watch the neighbors.)
A short walk away is Carolina Beach Park Lake where there is paddle boat rental, playground, and usually an outside kid-friendly movie (Toy Story, etc) each weekend. It also hosts the Saturday farmer's market.
Easy access (0.6 mi. ) to the Carolina Beach boardwalk with a small carnival throughout the summer and weekly fireworks. There are many great restaurants and bars with live entertainment most evenings. Do not miss Britt's Doughnuts!

Guest access
Guests will have access to the entire left side townhome during their visit.

listing_name: Coastal Cabana - 1 Block to beach with sound view
description:
Welcome to Coastal Cabana!
This centrally located beach house is exactly 0.1 miles from the nearest public beach access and 0.5 miles from The Carolina Beach Boardwalk. Guests are never far from a relaxing day by the ocean or the many exciting activities Carolina Beach has to offer.

The space
- Main unit of duplex. Private 3 Bed / 2 Bath with covered front porch and beautiful view of the sound. Please note there is a completely separate unit above this one with it's own private entrance at the back, this unit is another rental with a maximum occupancy of two people. We do not allow pets in this top unit.

- Appliances: full size fridge, dishwasher, stove/oven, microwave, blender, toaster and washer/dryer.

- Fully stocked kitchen: Dishes, pots/pans, utensils, coffee pot, french press, and bakeware.

- Bed linens and bath towels provided, as well as hand soap, dish soap, shampoo and conditioner, trash bags, paper towels, and coffee/tea.

- Beach chairs and towels available for guest use.

- WIFI throughout whole house with Orbi boosters and FireStick equipped TV's in all three bedrooms and main living room (Disney+, ESPN+, & Hulu provided)

- Pack ‘N’ Play and high chair included upon request.

- Pet friendly. Two pet limit, one time $125 pet fee. Please let us know at time of booking if you will be bringing pets and how many. Backyard is not fenced.

- Enjoy the view of Myrtle Grove Sound from the front porch while sipping your morning coffee or evening glass of wine.


Activities within walking distance:
- Beach, surfing, kayaking, fishing charters, boardwalk fun, restaurants, shopping, and nationally ranked Britt's Donut Shop!!!

- 10 min drive to Fort Fisher and NC Aquarium.

- 25 min drive to downtown Wilmington.

- 35 min drive to Wilmington International Airport.

Parking:
- 2-4 spaces available depending on vehicle size to the left of stairway.

Guest access
- Private access to entire 2nd level (3 bed/2 bath)

- Free parking for up to 4 vehicles (depending on size) to the left of entry stairway.

- Entry through front and back door. Keyless PIN code lock on front door that is specific to you.

Other things to note
Interested in renting the entire duplex or just need more space? Please see our additional listings under our profile.

listing_name: 1 Block to Beach, Restaurants & More! Anchors Away
description:
Welcome to Anchors Away!
• Private two bedroom apartment in Carolina Beach
• 1 minute walk to the Beach!
• Sweet front porch with relaxing Adirondacks and string lighting
• Just a short stroll to the boardwalk, Carolina Beach Boat Basin, restaurants & bars, ice cream, Britt’s donuts, bike rentals, and more

The space
Welcome to Anchors Away, your perfect coastal retreat in the heart of Carolina Beach, North Carolina! This private two-bedroom apartment offers a fully equipped kitchen, ensuring a comfortable and convenient stay. Located just one block from the pristine shoreline, you'll find yourself steps away from sun-soaked beaches, vibrant restaurants, and a variety of local attractions. Whether you're seeking a relaxing getaway or an adventure-filled vacation, Anchors Away provides the ideal setting for creating unforgettable memories.

Guest access
• Entry through front door with keyless PIN code lock that is specific to you
• Reserved off-street parking for 2 vehicles directly behind the duplex.
• Park on the grass directly BEHIND the building. The spaces in the front are used by unit B, and the gravel driveway to the side is privately owned by the neighbors, so please do not block either of those. The side driveway may be used to pull through to access the back spaces, or you can drive one street past Pelican Ln. on Canal Dr. and turn right at the yellow condos to get to the back spaces (this street is not named.)
• A maximum of 2 cars are allowed on the property. The third space is reserved for property management

Other things to note
• Private 2 bedroom apartment in Carolina Beach
• One Queen bedroom, one bunk bed room
• Shared outdoor lounge with fire pits and games.
• Close to all local amenities
• Well equipped kitchen to meet all your needs
• High-speed WiFi & Smart Roku TV
• Pack 'n' Play available on request
• Linens and bath towels included. Beach towels NOT included.
• We also provide enough hand soap, dish soap, toilet paper, paper towels, & trash bags to get you started upon arrival. However, if you are staying longer than a couple nights, please plan to supplement with your own supplies based on your personal needs.
• Please note, due to the central location of Anchor's Away, there may be noise heard from the local businesses

Pet Policy
• Please message us for pet approval prior to booking.
• If possible, please add pets to your reservation during the booking process. Once added, the $150 pet fee is included as part of the nightly rate (spread out equally over the course of the stay) and in the total price at checkout.
• Pet fee is non-refundable and is a flat rate for the stay.
• Limit is 2 dogs; no other animals permitted.
• Must pick up all droppings from pet(s).
• Dogs must be fully housebroken.
• Dogs are not permitted on furniture or linens

House Rules
• NO SMOKING. If anything is smoked inside, you will incur a $200 fee for deodorization treatment.
• Check-in time is 4:00PM and check out by 10:00AM. No parking on premises before check in time or after check out time. Unapproved late check are potentially subject to a $200 fee.
• In order to avoid potential staining, please do NOT use bleach to clean anything during your stay. We have professional cleaners who will use bleach appropriately in between guests to ensure a high standard of cleanliness.
• Only stainless steel cleaners may be used on stainless steel appliances. Other cleaners will cause stainless steel to rust, so please do not use them on the appliances.
• Visitors must be approved by the host.
• Be respectful of our neighbors. Keep noise volume low and no walking through neighbors yards.
• Do not burn incense, essential oils, or similar items. These scents are difficult to remove before the next guest checks in, and some guests may have sensitivity to smells.
• Guest must sign a rental agreement.

Traveling with a larger group? Consider booking both sides of this duplex. Check out Pelican's Perch (unit B) out by clicking on our profile and searching under \Joe & Michelle's Listings.\""

listing_name: Sandstep 616 1
description:
Oceanfront townhome with Pool

The space
Sandstep 616-1 offers the best of Carolina Beach Rentals
Rents weekly over the Summer!
3 Bedroom / 2 Bathroom / Sleeps 10 

Welcome to Sandstep 616-1! You'll be sure to flourish at the small and exclusive Sandstep Retreat community, where you can luxuriate in the shared community oceanfront pool, stroll to the beach on your shared private beach boardwalk, and fall in love with the island charm of Sandsteps.  Enjoy panoramic views from the generous windows throughout our great room or from your master bedroom.  Al fresco dining on your oceanfront deck can't be beat; or for a rainy day, cuddle up to our decorative fireplace in Ernest Hemingway Key West style furnishings. Our beautifully decorated and updated home will give you the vacation that you have been longing for. 

We are an Upper/Lower Duplex: If you are coming with a second family, Also book Sandstep 616-2 above us for a total of 9 bedrooms!

Ground Level:
Covered parking for 2 vehicles. Park Tandem, on the right side under the house as marked for 616-1.  A 3rd vehicle, size-dependent, may fit tandem on the driveway apron.
Stairwell access to property level, Shared Pool, Outdoor shower, and Beach access.
Pool hours are from 9 AM to dusk. The maximum number of guests allowed in the pool area at any given time is 16, including children. Guest count will be monitored by the HOA.

Property Level: 
One stairwell up to the entrance.
Living Room: Sofa, 2 soft side chairs, 2 side chairs and ottoman, occasional tables, TV behind decorative doors, ceiling fan, spectacular ocean views. 
Closet with tons of board games for rainy days! 
Dining Area: Dining Table with seating for six
Deck: Oceanfront, Dining Table w/ 4 chairs, 2 Lounge chairs, Propane grill
Kitchen: Fully equipped, solid surface countertops, double stainless sink, reverse osmosis drinking water, Stainless steel appliances, bar top seating for 3 
Primary Bedroom Suite: King-size bed, 2 nightstands, Chest of Drawers, Dresser with Mirror, Vertical wall-mounted dressing mirror, Blanket Rack, TV, private island view balcony. Ensuite Bathroom with Bathtub and Shower, double vanity, toilet
Guest Bedroom 1: Two Twin over Full bunk beds, TV, ceiling fan, pack-n-play, and stroller in closet for guest use.  (Bring your own sheet.)
Guest Bathroom: Bathtub with Shower, single vanity, toilet
Guest Bedroom 2: King-size Bed,2  Nightstands, Dresser, TV, ceiling fan 
Laundry Room with Washer and Dryer, Storage Shelving

Parking: 
3 cars, size dependent. Park Tandem, on the right side under the house as marked for 616-1.

Linens - Sheets and Towels will be wrapped in sealed packages and laying on the end of the beds. 

Rental Policies:
In response to the increased incidence of credit card fraud, a valid government photo ID will be required for every reservation. A signed rental agreement is required: accepting House Rules on any online travel agency requires reading and acceptance of our rental agreement.

Things to bring:
Paper towels and toilet paper, trash bags, soaps, detergents, minimal cleaning supplies, and beach towels.

Arrival/Departure:
Summer Check-ins (June-August) begin at 4 pm and are guaranteed by 6 pm
Check-out is by 10 am. 
We adhere to this policy so please do not arrive early or plan to delay your departure.

Guest Access:
Hard key.

House Rules:
No events such as weddings, bachelor/bachelorette parties, sororities/fraternities 
No smoking
You must be at least 25 to rent this unit.

Pool Notice:
Pools are generally open from Memorial Day until Labor Day; however, pool closures may be dictated by the HOA or the Health Department. Pools may also be closed after a hurricane or tropical storm. Sea Coast Rentals/Owners will not be held accountable. No refunds will be issued for these closures.

Pet Policy:
No pets allowed.

We want to make sure you’re aware of our cancellation policy. If you cancel when your arrival date is more than 60 days away, you will receive a full refund.  If you cancel when your arrival date is less than 60 days away, you will forfeit your deposit.

Things to do:
Adventure awaits. Discover aquatic wildlife and vegetation at the North Carolina Aquarium at Fort Fisher or enjoy a relaxing ferry ride across the Cape Fear River to a quaint little shopping town called Southport. Take a trip back in time at the Fort Fisher State Historic Site and Museum which features live oak-covered trails and bunkers from the American Civil War. Stroll through the marsh to visit the home of the famous Ft. Fisher Hermit. Or wind down with nature at our two state parks, sure to provide a memorable experience with hiking, fishing, and water activities such as paddle boarding and kayaking, and search for a Venus Flytrap which is native to NC only. As one of North Carolina's most undeveloped beaches, the island offers a unique opportunity to see many diverse coastal wildlife, including pelicans and loggerhead sea turtles, in their natural habitat. Whether it’s exploring activities on the island, enjoying the ocean views, or enjoying a cocktail by sunset from your own private balcony, Pleasure Island offers diversion for every enthusiast!
Explore the treasures of Carolina Beach, ranked one of the top 10 boardwalks in the country by Food & Wine magazine. One of the last remaining beach boardwalks on the East Coast, it includes a variety of restaurants, an arcade, shops, ice cream, Famous Britts Donuts, bars, and more! During the summer months, the Boardwalk is bustling with the sound of music, carnival rides, bingo, family nights, and events like the weekly fireworks and concert series. Annual off-season events include the Cape Fear Kite Festival, Christmas by the Sea, and the Island of Lights Festival.
We look forward to you visiting us!

Guest access
Our properties are individually owned, and our guests will have use of the entire property! Please refer to the listing for details.

Other things to note
You must be at least 25 years of age to book this property.

The living room and master bedroom are both on the front of the unit facing with a double size deck that looks out over the beach and ocean. listing_name: 1 Minute Walk To Beach - Pelican's Perch
description:
Welcome to Pelican's Perch
• Private two bedroom apartment in Carolina Beach
• 1 minute walk to the Beach with private outdoor dining area
• Just a short stroll to the boardwalk, Carolina Beach Boat Basin, restaurants & bars, ice cream, Britt’s donuts, bike rentals, and more

The space
Welcome to Pelican's Perch, your serene seaside sanctuary in beautiful Carolina Beach, North Carolina! This private two-bedroom apartment features a full-sized kitchen complete with a dishwasher, providing all the comforts of home. Situated just one block from the beach, you'll enjoy effortless access to the sun, sand, and surf. Whether you're planning a family vacation or a romantic getaway, Pelican's Perch offers the perfect blend of relaxation and convenience for an unforgettable coastal experience.

Guest access
• Reserved off-street parking for 3 vehicles directly in front of duplex
• Entry through front and back doors. Keyless PIN code lock on front door that is specific to you.

Other things to note
• Private apartment in Carolina Beach
• One Queen bedroom, one bedroom with two queen beds
• Shared outdoor lounge with fire pits and games.
• Close to all local amenities
• Cute & private outdoor dining area
• Well equipped kitchen to meet all your needs
• High-speed WiFi & Smart Roku TV
• Pack 'n' Play available on request
• Linens and bath towels included. Beach towels NOT included.
• We also provide enough hand soap, dish soap, toilet paper, paper towels, & trash bags to get you started upon arrival. However, if you are staying longer than a couple nights, please plan to supplement with your own supplies based on your personal needs.
• Please note, due to the central location of Pelican's Perch, there may be noise heard from the local businesses

Pet Policy
• Please message us for pet approval prior to booking.
• If possible, please add pets to your reservation during the booking process. Once added, the $150 pet fee is included as part of the nightly rate (spread out equally over the course of the stay) and in the total price at checkout.
• Pet fee is non-refundable and is a flat rate for the stay.
• Limit is 2 dogs; no other animals permitted.
• Must pick up all droppings from pet(s).
• Dogs must be fully housebroken.
• Dogs are not permitted on furniture or linens

House Rules
• NO SMOKING. If anything is smoked inside, you will incur a $200 fee for deodorization treatment.

listing_name: Spacious Condo | Water Views | Pool & Beach Access
description:
This space is perfect for anything from a couples retreat, to a family vacation. Come enjoy the quaint community feel of our building and find out why so many people fall in love with Carolina Beach!

The space
Our beach condo just went through a major renovation and we can’t wait for our guests to enjoy the updates we’ve made. Brand new kitchen cabinets and countertops, flooring throughout the entire condo, and new glass doors to take in those amazing water views, are just a few of the updates you will enjoy.

There is plenty of space inside the condo and lots to do outside. With the canal just steps from the building, beach access less than a 5 minute walk, and downtown Carolina beach just a mile down the road, you can’t go wrong with this location!

Guest access
Along with full access to the condo, guests will have 2 assigned parking spaces as well as access to the pool, boat docks, private shed with beach amenities, and grill common areas.

Other things to note
Guest Agreement & Community Guidelines

We’re delighted to welcome you to our condo! Our goal is to provide you with a comfortable and enjoyable stay while also respecting the community. To ensure a smooth experience, please take note of the following guidelines:

Respect for the Community:
Our condo is part of a shared building with 18 units, many of which are occupied by full-time residents and weekend homeowners. Staying here offers a relaxed, community atmosphere rather than a busy hotel setting. Out of courtesy for our neighbors, we kindly ask that you keep noise levels low between 10 PM and 7 AM.

Please also be mindful that sound may carry from surrounding units, as there are neighbors to the left, right, and above.
Building & HOA Rules:
Upon arrival, please take a moment to review the HOA Rules & Regulations, Grilling Guidelines, and Pool Rules included in the welcome packet. These guidelines are in place to ensure a great experience for all guests and residents.

Pets:
While we love pets, they are only allowed with prior approval from Alex or Jennifer. If you are traveling with a pet, please contact us before your stay. Unauthorized pets may result in a forfeiture of the security deposit.

Parties & Gatherings:
To maintain a peaceful environment, parties are not permitted. If evidence of a party is found, guests may be asked to leave immediately, and the remainder of the stay will be forfeited. Any damage beyond normal wear may result in additional charges.

Overnight Guests:
For safety and liability reasons, only registered guests included in the original reservation may stay overnight. If your plans change and you need to add a guest, please contact Alex or Jennifer in advance. Additional guests beyond the original reservation (up to 6 total) may incur extra nightly charges.

Maintenance & Care:
If anything requires attention during your stay, please notify us right away rather than attempting repairs. We want to ensure everything remains in great condition for you and future guests.

Furniture & Property Care:
We take great pride in maintaining a clean and comfortable space. Please leave all furniture, fixtures, and amenities in their original placement and condition. If anything gets moved, we kindly ask that you return it before check-out.

Thank you for choosing our condo for your stay—we appreciate your cooperation in helping us maintain a wonderful experience for everyone. If you have any questions, don’t hesitate to reach out!

Alex & Jennifer

listing_name: Oceanfront Peace and Tranquility - Bella Vista!
description:
“Bella Vista' was named for its breathtaking views of one of North Carolina’s most beautiful beaches. Whether you are enjoying a fresh cup of coffee during sunrise, or sharing a bottle of wine at sunset, our huge private deck offers a spectacular panoramic view of the pristine beach and blue water. The deck can be accessed from the master bedroom and the living room. The inside of this newly renovated condo offers wave crashing views from almost every room.

The space
Begin life-long vacation memories by leaving your oceanfront condo and stepping right onto the beach. There is a manned life guard stand from Memorial Day to Labor Day. Enjoy soaking up the sun, fishing, or dolphin watching. If you are lucky, you may get to see a mother loggerhead turtle and her babies. After the beach, you can wash off at the outdoor shower, and enjoy a dip in our pool that is private for the condo complex.

Carolina Beach, which is part of Pleasure Island along with Kure Beach and Fort Fisher, is located 15 miles from the historic port city of Wilmington. Charming Wilmington is known for its cobblestone roads along the Cape Fear River, antique shops, restaurants, and the Azalea Festival. Our location at Carolina Beach is considered the best on the island, boasting the widest beach and expansive views. Wake up early, walk across the street and enjoy a fresh cup of coffee and muffin, or go next door for some homemade pancakes. On your way back, stop at the lake that offers a paved walking trail, playground, paddle boats, and kayaking. We are also within walking distance to the boardwalk, arcade, shops, restaurants, and ice cream parlor and a short ride to the North Carolina Aquarium, historic Fort Fisher, movie theatre, charter boats, golf and other fun things to do. Pleasure Island hosts various festivals with live entertainment throughout the year. Stay with us and enjoy the Carolina Beach Jazz and Seafood Festival, Wilmington’s Azalea Festival or one of many summer evenings at the pavilion watching free outdoor movies with the children.

Guest access
You will have access to the entire condo and all of it's amenities.

Other things to note
We have a fully equipped kitchen with pots, pans, utensils, plates, cups and wine glasses. We've got most everything you'd need - even an XL steam pot to make that seafood feast.

We provide all linens, including towels. Please let us know up front which rooms need linens and how many people we can plan for.

Bring beach toys, a cooler, beach chairs and an umbrella. You can rent beach chairs and an umbrella - even having them installed and waiting for you. Just ask me for details.

listing_name: BIG DECK! Tiki Bar! Oceanfront Pool! Elevator!
description:
Beautiful Oceanfront Condo in the PERFECT location. Steps from the oceanfront Tiki Bar/Grill.

The space
Luxury Oceanfront Retreat with Private Pool

Indulge in the ultimate coastal escape at this beautifully designed oceanfront condo, perfect for families or groups seeking relaxation and fun. With private beach access, a stunning oceanfront pool, and one of the largest decks in Carolina Beach, this retreat offers a luxurious yet comfortable getaway with breathtaking views every step of the way.

Elevator Open Year-round
Pool Opens From April 1st to October 31st

**Highlights You'll Love**
- **Private Oceanfront Pool** just steps from your door.
- **Private Beach Access** making your seaside adventures effortless.
- **Expansive Deck with Panoramic Views** – the perfect spot for morning coffee, afternoon naps, or sunset cocktails.
- **Oceanfront Master Suite** with direct deck access and incredible views.
- **Ocean Views from the Kitchen and Living Room**, allowing you to soak in the beauty of the shore throughout your stay.
- **Convenient Elevator** located steps away from the front door, ensuring easy access to the condo from the ground floor.
- **Parking Below the Unit** adds additional convenience for guests.

**Comprehensive Amenities**
We’ve thought of everything so you can travel light and focus on making memories:
- **Technology at Your Fingertips**: Smart TVs with cable in the Master Bedroom, Guest Bedroom, and Living Room, plus an Alexa Bluetooth Speaker for unlimited music and entertainment.
- **High-Speed WiFi** for staying connected or streaming your favorite shows.
- **Essential Comforts** provided, including linens, bath towels, shampoo, conditioner, body wash, 2 rolls of toilet paper, 1 roll of paper towels, and hand soap.
- **Beach Gear Provided**: 4 adult beach chairs, a beach cart, cornhole boards, and toys for the little ones.

**Inside the Condo**

**Oceanfront Master Suite**
- Enjoy unmatched luxury in a **king bed** with a private en-suite bathroom and walkout access to the stunning oceanfront deck.
- Relax to the sound of waves while sipping a drink or marveling at the stars at night.
- A **pack-n-play** is neatly stored in the closet for families traveling with little ones.

**Second Bedroom**
- Features a cozy **full bed** and a sturdy set of bunk beds, each holding up to 500 lbs, making it perfect for kids or additional guests.
- A fully renovated bathroom with a tub and shower is conveniently located right outside the bedroom.

**Additional Sleeping Arrangements**
- Two **memory foam tri-fold mattresses** stored in the master closet, ideal for accommodating extra guests.
- The **living room sectional** comfortably seats your group and doubles as a bed for two.

**Living Area**
- Lounge as a group in the open and inviting **living room**, featuring a large sectional, Smart TV, and games for everyone, from kids to adults.

**Kitchen & Dining**
- The **well-equipped kitchen** includes all the necessities for whipping up delicious meals or quick snacks. From a fridge, microwave, and dishwasher to pots, pans, plates, and a coffee maker, everything is at your fingertips.

**Outdoor Storage**
- Convenient outdoor storage includes beach chairs, cornhole boards, and toys to keep your group entertained throughout your stay.

**Why Guests Adore this Home**
Here’s what makes this stay unforgettable for families and groups:
- **“One of the best beach homes we’ve stayed in with pristine views and top-notch amenities!”**
- **“The private pool and large deck were the highlights! My kids loved all the included beach toys.”**
- **“Perfect location, thoughtful touches, and everything you could possibly need for a relaxing getaway.”**

Take in the beauty, convenience, and stunning oceanfront views from this incredible retreat. Whether it’s a family vacation or a quiet escape with friends, this home has everything you need to make your trip extraordinary.

Book your dream getaway today and start making unforgettable seaside memories! ??????

listing_name: The Plover Place Oceanfront, 2 BR, 2 BTH top floor
description:
The Plover Place is calling for you!

Top floor, OCEANFRONT 2 bedroom, 2 bathroom condo on Carolina Beach. Never leave the kitchen and living room to take in amazing ocean views. Or take the private walkway with a direct path to the beach. GREAT location, only a 10-15 minute walk to enjoy the Carolina Beach Boardwalk and the infamous Britt's Donuts.

The space
The updated condo features a fully equipped kitchen that opens up to the living and dining area and expansive ocean views. The dining area seats four and the island counter top has extra seating for four. There is a 55- inch Samsung LED Smart television with Roku (byo logins for streaming any app you use) and Blu-Ray DVD in the living area. The master bedroom has a NEW Tuft&Needle King-size bed, a private full bath, 42-inch Samsung television with Roku, a spacious walk-in closet, blackout curtains and a private balcony with views of the Intracoastal Waterway. The second bedroom has 2 NEW Tuft&Needle TwinXL beds and an over-sized window with blackout curtains for any amount of light. Pack n Play is available for families with small children.

Included for your convenience is wireless high-speed internet, Roku for streaming, puzzles, DVDs, and books for extra entertainment for the whole family. There is no elevator to access the condo, but the stairs are worth the view at the top as you walk in!

There are assigned parking spaces for 2 compact to mid-sized vehicles. An outdoor showerhead is available at the building when you return from your day at the beach.

This is a non-smoking, no pet unit. Failure to comply with this will result in the loss of your deposit.

Guest access
Two assigned parking spots are available. Large or oversized vehicles may have difficulty with size of parking and access.

listing_name: Condo w/ Ocean View, Community Pool & Beach Access
description:
This cozy 2 bed/2 bath top level oceanfront condo, located in the heart of Carolina Beach, offers spectacular ocean views and is well-equipped for all of your vacation needs. There is something for everyone here at The Carolina Kraken!

Guest access
For your convenience all of our properties offer keyless entry. An access code will be sent via email prior to your stay.

Other things to note
Enjoy all the island life has to offer at this well-appointed oceanfront condo located on the top floor of the popular Sands IV condos. Community amenities available include a 3 ft. deep saltwater splash pool, direct beach access, outdoor showers, and an oceanfront grilling area. The Carolina Kraken is conveniently located just a short distance to the boardwalk, the beach, shops, restaurants, the marina, and the Carolina Beach Lake Park.

This convenient getaway is fully equipped for all of your vacation needs. Enjoy an open floor plan with views of the ocean from the living room, dining area, and kitchen. The King suite also offers incredible views of the ocean and has a private bathroom, smart streaming TV, and private access to the oceanfront deck. The second bedroom offers two twin beds, a smart streaming TV, and shared access to the second bathroom. For convenience, the sofa in the living room pulls out into a Queen-sized bed. The kitchen has recently updated appliances and counters making preparing large meals easy. The large oceanfront deck offers plenty of seating and is the perfect place to relax and catch the sunrise or take in the ocean breeze throughout your stay!

Summer activities on the boardwalk and at the lake all summer long include fireworks, free movies, concerts, festivals, and more.

Parking instructions:
2 Parking passes provided. To avoid towing, please have a completed parking pass visible in your windshield. If parked in, see the parking pass of the blocking car for their contact information Each unit has two spaces. Golf carts and trailers count. No additional parking passes can be provided due to strict HOA rules and regulations. Any additional vehicles must park in paid public parking.

**INCLUDED: WIFI, fully stocked kitchen, paper goods, and ALL linens, including all bedding + bath + beach towels to save you the hassle/cost of renting them separately ($200-300+ value)! When you arrive, beds will be made with crisp, fresh linens and complete sets of fluffy towels will be available.

You must be 25 years or older to rent this property.

Please notify our office if you're planning to bring a pet as the following pet policy will apply: A maximum of 2 pets are permitted. ONLY DOGS ARE ALLOWED. The pet fee is $250 plus tax per pet. No dogs are allowed without prior approval and payment of a non-refundable pet fee, per pet. Undisclosed dogs will incur a minimum $300 fine plus tax. Violation of our 2-pet maximum policy will incur a minimum of $300 plus tax charge, per pet, plus the tenant will be in material breach of the lease, and grounds for eviction will apply. The pet must be removed from the premises immediately, and your reservation may be canceled with no refund given.

**Please note:  All service animals & emotional support animals must be disclosed at the time of booking to allow the agent to collect records and documentation to support the request in accordance with all state and federal laws. A pet fee will NOT be charged for true Service Animals.**

From April 1st – Sept. 30, dogs are allowed on the beach before 9:00 am and after 5:00 pm. No dogs are allowed on the beach between 9:00 am -5:00 pm. From October 1st – May 31st, dogs are allowed on the beach at any time.

Sea Scape requires that all reservations have a signed rental agreement that will be sent to you via text message after booking. Once you've booked your stay, you will have 48 hrs. to complete the rental agreement to confirm your stay. Sea Scape reserves the right to cancel your booking if the rental agreement is not completed within 48hrs.

Booking a vacation rental can be stressful! Our goal is to make the process as easy as possible for our guests and to provide excellent customer service every time. Please contact us with specific requests, and we'll do our best to help!

description:
Relax in this lovely oceanfront townhome, the perfect destination for your beach vacation! With breathtaking ocean views, direct beach access, and five spacious decks—including a massive 35x10 oceanfront deck ideal for lounging and dolphin watching—this home is designed for ultimate relaxation. Inside, you'll find a beautifully equipped kitchen with stainless steel appliances, a brand-new microwave and refrigerator, and all the tools you need to prepare meals.

The space
Unwind in the master suite, or gather in the great room to enjoy a movie on the Roku TV.

Fresh linens and towels are included in the cleaning fee, so no need to worry about extra charges!

This home comfortably sleeps up to 13 guests, featuring 5 bedrooms and 4 bathrooms. Other highlights include a private outdoor shower, a charcoal grill, and parking for up to four vehicles. Located less than a mile from downtown Carolina Beach and the Carolina Beach Boardwalk you'll enjoy the convenience of this property. description:
Souls in the Sand is a beautiful 2 bed/2bath 3rd floor oceanfront condo with epic views & less than 4 mins for your toes to hit the sand! You will love to catch the breathtaking sunrise from the comfort from your private balcony!
Conveniently located to all things Carolina Beach: biking, kayaking, fishing charters, hiking at the CB State Park and our famous boardwalks and fishing piers with great restaurants and shopping! Downtown Wilmington and the airport less than 45 minuets away! Communit

The space
The pool is located just behind the condo. The HOA opens the pool mid April and closes typically the second week in September, depending on weather.

We also supply the following for each property:
A starter kit of one roll of toilet paper per bathroom, one roll of paper towels, a trash bag, and dish soap. We also supply laundered bed linens, comforters, and 1 bathing towel and wash cloth per person. We do not supply any beach gear or beach towel. We have great rental companies on the island we would be more than happy to share the info with you. We also do not supply laundry detergent, body soap or shampoo/conditioner as we find everyone has their own preferences for these =) Please review our house rules prior to your stay

Guest access
This unit is on the 3rd floor
There is no elevator

- two parking spaces in tandem

-Walk, bike, public parking at beaches and in town

-Bike and golf cart rentals are available on the island

-Uber cars and taxi's are also available

Other things to note
Please let us know if you need any recommendations for beach rentals such as bicycles, surf or stand up paddle boards, and golf carts.

There is a Beach re-nourishment done in Carolina and Kure beach every 3 years. This helps to keep our beaches safe from erosion. Please note that we have no control over this project and that it is normally concluded by May, but there is a possibility of delays.
